programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Amanda Seyfried co-star in this sci-fi thriller set in a future world where aging stops at 25, and the only way for one man to stay alive is to steal more time.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: Peeples
programme.desc: Sparks - and laughs - fly when Wade Walker (Craig Robinson) crashes the Peeples' annual family reunion in the Hamptons to ask for their daughter's (Kerry Washington) hand in marriage.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Old-school salesmen Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) try to reboot their careers by joining Google’s fiercely competitive internship program — with hilarious results!

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: George is a retired soccer pro whose glory days are behind him. Burnt out on his playboy lifestyle and bankrupted by a string of bad investments, he moves back to Virginia to reconnect with his estranged ex-wife and neglected son.

programme.title: Elvira's Haunted Hills
programme.desc: ELVIRA'S HAUNTED HILLS culls its outragousness from the classic Vincent Price/Roger Corman films of the early 60's along with a little Rocky Horror Picture Show and Fearless Vampire Killers.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Another Fine Mess
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie hide in a mansion to escape from a policeman.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Below Zero
programme.desc: In need of money, Ollie signs Stan up for a prize fight against an old nemesis.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Any Old Port!
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie have a streak of back luck after their instruments get smashed.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Berth Marks
programme.desc: Stanley and Oliver stumble into the wrong sleeping compartment on the train to Pottsville.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Perfect Day
programme.desc: Perfect Day is a 1929 short comedy film starring Laurel and Hardy.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Blotto
programme.desc: Stan must lie to his wife to go out with Ollie.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: One of Jesse's Gang
programme.desc: A respected member of the community shoots a thief and is hailed as a hero. However, it is found that he himself is wanted for being in the James gang.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Hanging Judge
programme.desc: Earp is not happy with Judge Tobin's habit of being liberal with sentencing men to hang.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Command Performance
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill Cody and Ned Buntline bring a German prince through Dodge City. They ask Earp to help fake a robbery to provide excitement for the Prince.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: They Hired Some Guns
programme.desc: Two stage lines are competing over a single route with the feud turning into a gun battle in Dodge City as each side outbids the other for hired guns.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Bat is forced to hang Dal who he believes is innocent. Dal has been framed by the White Cap vigilantes and Earp wants to stop them.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Vultures
programme.desc: Two bounty hunters arrive in the Dodge City area looking for a wanted man. They shoot him for a $1000 reward. Earp agrees to get their money but wants them out of town.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Young Gun
programme.desc: Brash teen Jimmy Craig arrives in Dodge City planning to be a deputy. However, he introduces himself to the town by picking a gunfight with a man in a group teasing him about his age.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Nice Ones Always Die First
programme.desc: Bat's brother Ed arrives in Dodge City broke and needing a job. Bat doesn't believe he has the ability to be a good lawman and doesn't want to hire him.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: Storm
programme.desc: A meteorologist sets out to derail the top secret weather-manipulating program he mistakenly became a part of.

programme.title: 500 mph Storm
programme.desc: When an energy experiment goes haywire, a rash of massive hurricanes rips across North America. A scientist must get his family to safety before the hurricanes merge, creating a "hypercane" with the power to wipe America off the map.

programme.title: Killer Infatuation
programme.desc: Mackenzie runs a killer-dedicated podcast with a large fan base. However, she begins living her own murder mystery, as she develops an infatuation with her impossibly attractive new neighbor, who was the prime suspect in a murder years ago.

programme.title: Her Boyfriend’s Secret
programme.desc: INSPIRED BY TRUE EVENTS - Renowned interior designer Melissa is drawn into a relationship with a man who has a secret life -- another wife and family. She soon meets another innocent victim and learns her man is more than duplicitous, he’s a killer!

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: When Patricia is called to identify a body, she’s shocked to find her mirror image lying dead on a gurney. Determined to find out more about her surprise ‘twin’ and simultaneously, help her mother clear her father's name.

programme.title: Merlin: The Return
programme.desc: The evil sorcerer Mordred and his dark forces are pitted against the mythical sorcery of Merlin. Under Merlin's spell, Mordred and his mother have been imprisoned for 1500 years, but a meddlesome scientist from the present creates a gateway to escape.

programme.title: G-Loc
programme.desc: In a world on the brink of environmental collapse, mass migration to neighbouring planet, Rhea, is humanity's final hope for survival.

programme.title: Area Q
programme.desc: After his son disappears a journalist goes to Brazil to investigate, where he discovers close encounter sightings that have taken place in a region known as Area Q, where he may uncover the mystery surrounding his son's disappearance.

programme.title: Firehouse Dog
programme.desc: Hollywood's most pampered pooch gets lost during a commercial shoot and ends up as the mascot for a local fire station.

programme.title: American Black Beauty
programme.desc: After Cheryl witnesses her father’s tragic death in a riding accident, she is sent to live with her last remaining relatives, the Lane Family, on their country ranch. Cheryl is introduced to Black Beauty and the two soon form an unbreakable friendship.

programme.title: Switched
programme.desc: Tired of being bullied, Cassandra Evans prays that her nemesis, Katie Sharp, the queen bee of social media, would know what it's like to walk a day in her shoes. Her prayer is answered in an unexpected way when they get "Switched."

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A young officer in Napoleon's Army pursues a mysterious woman to the castle of an elderly Baron.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Ultra Witch
programme.desc: Ultra Witch dries up the world's milk supply, but she exposes herself by sending a henchman out for cookies.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Wizard
programme.desc: The Wizard devises a scheme to steal all of the national monuments for his own personal exhibit. Meanwhile, Walter concocts an antidote that works on every poison known to man.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Skull
programme.desc: The Skull decides to resurrect all of the world's villains, beginning with a mummy.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Weatherman
programme.desc: The Weatherman causes a national blizzard in the middle of summer and demands that U.S. citizens unanimously elect him president.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Lawrence of Moravia
programme.desc: Frank and Bruce are captured by a sheik who's been stealing plumbing supplies just for the thrill of it.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Albert/Alberta
programme.desc: As dual-gendered Albert/Alberta begins melting glaciers in a plot to flood the world, he/she attempts to complete a collection of animals, which is missing a male werewolf and a male vampire.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Queen Bee
programme.desc: Dracula infiltrates the Queen Bee's hive in an effort to thwart a worldwide bee invasion.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates when a masked man is found at the bottom of a skyscraper.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigate what appears to be a fatal car-jacking.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: With the help of D B Russell, Mac is able to identify who kidnapped Christine.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team unravels three twisted tales of love in a trio of separate murder cases.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A riot threatens to break out at a Manhattan precinct.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Adam witnesses a murder online while participating in a webchat with a stranger.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man storms the crime lab and takes new recruit Jesse Cardoza hostage.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs search for an inventive murderer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Bad Seed
programme.desc: Delko returns to the team following an extended absence through injury.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A wedding takes a wrong turn when the bride is missing her groom.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a fatal car accident.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Kill Clause
programme.desc: The CSIs suspect a company is killing its employees in order to profit.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston and Nick are called to investigate a murder at a fast food restaurant and have quite a task ahead of them when they discover that much of the evidence is coated in cooking oil.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While Langston testifies in the trial of a respected Congressman, new evidence sends the CSIs back to the lab to reopen the investigation.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to three different crime scenes in one night that are seemingly unrelated, but each case's forensic evidence reveals a common link.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When the CSIs are called to a murder scene at a familiar motel, Nick is thrown for a loop as he pieces together three separate murder investigations that all took place at the same establishment over the course of a year.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston and Riley are taken hostage during the aftermath of a shootout in an usually calm Las Vegas community.

programme.title: Scorpion: Extinction
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must work with their old nemesis Mark Collins in order to prevent the extinction of mankind. Also, Walter and Paige awkwardly navigate their new relationship. Josh Leonard guest stars.

programme.title: Scorpion: More Extinction
programme.desc: Team Scorpion continues to work with their nemesis, Mark Collins, in order to prevent an extinction event that could end humanity. Also, Cabe's last-minute decision while on the case leads to the possible end of his career.

programme.title: Scorpion: Grow a Deer, A Female Deer
programme.desc: When poachers almost kill a pregnant endangered deer, Team Scorpion recreates the animal's womb to try to save it and its baby's life. Also, Happy and Toby discuss the future of their family.

programme.title: Scorpion: Nuke Kids on the Block
programme.desc: While decommissioning an old nuclear missile, a simple accident causes Team Scorpion to endure exposure to toxic vapor while trying to prevent the nuke from detonating.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sci Hard
programme.desc: While attending a tech convention, Team Scorpion is taken hostage by a group attempting a virtual heist.

programme.title: Scorpion: Queen Scary
programme.desc: At Halloween, Team Scorpion takes on a case to prove the existence of ghosts on the Queen Mary but find an all-too-real disaster when they locate a 'ghost ship' on a deadly collision course.

programme.title: Beyond Sherwood Forest
programme.desc: The Sheriff of Nottingham uses a shape-shifting monster to destroy Robin Hood (Robin Dunne).

programme.title: Three Musketeers
programme.desc: The MovieSphere Channel is serving up an endless stream of top-quality movies, from blockbuster hits to cult classics and everything in between.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: A war-hardened Crusader and his Moorish commander mount an audacious revolt against the corrupt English crown.

programme.title: Laughter in Paradise
programme.desc: When a playful millionaire dies, he leaves a surprise for his loved ones. However, in order to claim his fortune, they must complete assignments that will help them become better people.

programme.title: Make Mine Mink
programme.desc: An Englishwoman recruits a retired major, a spinster and a teacher to steal furs for charity.

programme.title: Don't Bother to Knock
programme.desc: A flirtatious travel agent gives all his girlfriends keys to his flat, which seemingly backfires.

programme.title: Medium: Talk To The Hand
programme.desc: After getting a skin graft on her hand, Allison is perplexed when the same hand starts moving with a mind of its own.

programme.title: Medium: Where Were You When..?
programme.desc: When Allison flashes to a specific time in the future, her fear grows as she begins to feel powerless to stop a catastrophic event from taking place.

programme.title: Medium: Native Tongue
programme.desc: Allison becomes suddenly unable to understand spoken language, developing a friendship with a linguist along the way.

programme.title: Medium: Smoke Damage
programme.desc: Allison's dreams of a blaze could help solve mysterious fire related deaths, and Devalos ponders the next step in his career.

programme.title: Medium: The People In Your Neighborhood
programme.desc: Allison's neighbors are furious when a convicted sex offender moves into the area, but Allison's visions have her questioning his guilt.

programme.title: Medium: Blood On The Tracks
programme.desc: When a man is killed by a train, Allison has a dream forewarning of an identical murder.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Teenage gang members are out for revenge after a distressed classmate accuses one of their boyfriends of rape.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When the SRU responds to a violent altercation between a young man and his father, the boy flees the police and runs into the woods, sending the team on a manhunt

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When a young man holds a courtroom hostage in an attempt to clear his name for a crime he didn't commit, an SRU team member is in the wrong place at the wrong time and must find a way to safely defuse a critical situation.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: What starts out as a routine security watch for the SRU turns into a critical situation when the wife of the man they were hired to protect is kidnapped from underneath their noses.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When a woman kidnaps another woman whom she suspects of having an affair with her husband, the SRU is called to the scene.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When a former SRU veteran shows up at headquarters and locks himself in a safe room with the intent to commit suicide, Ed is called to the scene and attempts to talk his former teacher out of ending his life.

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Adam (Jim Sturgess, "Cloud Atlas") and Eden (Kirsten Dunst), a pair of star-crossed lovers separated onto twin worlds with opposite gravity, risk everything to reconnect.

programme.title: King Of California
programme.desc: Commercial airline pilot Whip Whitaker (Denzel Washington) has a problem with drugs and alcohol, though so far he's managed to complete his flights safely.

programme.title: Love and Honor
programme.desc: While fighting in Vietnam, Dalton hears his girlfriend has dumped him so decides to fly to get her back. AWOL from the war zone, he has seven days to get back to the US, change his girlfriend's mind and make it back to Vietnam without anyone noticing

programme.title: 12 In A Box
programme.desc: 12 In A Box is the laugh-out-loud story of 12 former school friends who get together for a reunion they will never forget. Staring Miranda Hart.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: This Wraps it Up
programme.desc: Naomi is extremely self-conscious about her height. That, plus the fact that she's the only girl on her class field trip to the Egyptian Pyramids.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Grounds for Horror
programme.desc: Petey and the rest of the guys are looking forward to a week of summer R and R at Camp Rockbotom - until flat-topped Counsellor Bill call them to attention and informs them that there will be no time for fun.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Ghost Ship
programme.desc: Radical surf dudes Mike and Ben decide to take Ben's father's most bodacious speedboat for a spin - without permission.

programme.title: Carnival of Souls
programme.desc: After a traumatic accident, a woman becomes drawn to a mysterious abandoned carnival.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Strange Partners
programme.desc: A wealthy man uses extortion and a trained attack dog to force Peter to kill his partner and make it look like a heart attack.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Odds Against Death
programme.desc: A gangster forces one of Peter's staff to developed a mathematical system to win at the roulette table.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Picnic With Death
programme.desc: Peter's existence as an invisible man becomes public knowledge, while Sally's friend needs help when her stepfather plots to kill her invalid mother.

programme.desc: A family of psychopaths takes Chester hostage.

programme.desc: A man returns to Dodge to kill his brother as revenge for marrying his fiancée.

programme.desc: A young man is unaware that his hero was once a gunslinger.

programme.desc: Although Kitty has prevented two men from molesting Chavela Ramirez, the girl's father wants revenge.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Five-O officer Danny Williams, a European royal family visiting Hawaii, and potentially many other people are periled by a deranged youth who is using a stolen vial of super-lethal nerve gas in an attempt to avenge his dead father.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett and team investigate the murder of a former Japanese spy, an aged importer, believed to know the location of a hidden WW2 gold fortune. The killer may be searching for treasure before importer's son arrives from the mainland.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett watches with stunned realization as the state's rock-solid murder case against Islands racketeer Kum Chi suddenly vaporizes because McGarrett has been suckered by the prosecution's star witness.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett & Five-O investigate a deadly fire at Honolulu's Global Trade Center. Sub-standard materials caused the rapid spread. Targets: corrupt contractor & inspector taking bribes.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett & Five-O hunt for killers of a girl & hang-glider pilot. Slow progress until victim's roommate, burdened by guilt, risks life to aid McGarrett.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Three criminals plan to devastate the Hawaiian sugar cane industry by importing a borer moth with no known cure or natural predator. Their goal is to ruin the land, allowing one of them to purchase it at a low price.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver contemplates resigning from the Phoenix Foundation.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: A head injury resulting from a confrontation with hitmen who fear MacGyver knows too much about their assassination plot against the leaders of the Omega Forceanti-terrorist brigade, causes MacGyver (Richard Dean Anderson) to lose his memory.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver travels to Czechoslovakia to rescue a dissident from the top-security psychiatric ward of a Czech hospital.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: When former mobster Jimmy "The Eraser's" new identity is exposed, MacGyver is forced into action to save Jimmy's daughter and grandson.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A friendly peddler's ability to bargain saves Gil Favor's men from an attack by a tribe of hungry Chetennes.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Three wagonloads of attractive "mail-order" brides, misled about their destination, get help from Gil Favor's drovers.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A wealthy rancher tries to adopt Gil Favor's two daughters, who come all the way from Philadelphia to see their father.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Gil Favor and Pete Nolan join the U.S. Army -- temporarily - to negotiate a trade of six Army deserters for one Crow Indian chief.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A distraught mother offers the town of Dry Rock $300,000 if it will clear her dead son's name of murder and robbery.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie, the dispatcher, becomes a lovesick pup after his girlfriend finds another guy. He will stop at nothing to get her back, including recruiting Alex for his hilarious scheme—and the riotous shenanigans at the Sunshine Cab Co. never stop.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a riotous family reunion when Jim returns home to face his millionaire dad for the first time since he dropped out of society in the ‘60s, and Alex has his hands full with Jim’s voluptuous, overly amorous sister,

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The Taxi gang falls prey to hilarious fear for homeless Elaine’s romantic well-being when chivalrous Bobby allows her to live in his apartment while he is gone. Unexpectedly, he returns before she has found other quarters

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Latka Gravas is rejected by a young beauty, he sets out on an uproarious crash course to learn to be a swinging American Bachelor, a turnabout that works fantastically with the girls but turns off all of his friends at the garage.

programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines why Graham Backhouse attempted to kill his wife with a car bomb before murdering his neighbour in 1984.

programme.desc: When a Devonshire fisherman hauled in his nets on July 28 1996, he made a gruesome discovery: among that day’s catch was a dead body. There was nothing to identify the man’s body except a Rolex watch and a small maple leaf tattoo on his hand.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Little Miss Nobody: Alan Charlton

programme.desc: On October 31, 2013, Belgian politician Bernard Ouessfal rushed down the six flights of a hotel in Ostend where he had met up with his wife, Véronique, the day before. He had found her unconscious in the bathroom with a mysterious plastic bag next to her

programme.title: Happy Days: The Duel
programme.desc: The Fonz defends America's pride and saves Richie's hide when he matches blades with a French fencing champion, who not only insults the country, but makes nasty remarks about Joanie

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork Goes Public
programme.desc: When a reporter offers a reward for proof of alien life, Mork decides to turn himself in to pay back the McConnells.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork's First Christmas
programme.desc: Mork can't afford to buy Christmas presents, so he makes strange, unique gifts for each of his closest friends.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork's Best Friend
programme.desc: Mork gets a pet caterpillar; Exidor begins preaching about reincarnation.

programme.desc: After ruining Fred and Mindy's night, Mork decides he wants to go back to Ork, so Orson shows him what the McConnells' lives would have been like if Mork had never arrived on Earth.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Was Presidential hopeful, Robert F. Kennedy really killed by disgruntled Palestinian Sirhan Sirhan as we’ve been led to believe? Or was he another in a long line of Manchurian candidates, a victim of a long standing mind control program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard witnesses a municipal employee in Toronto, Canada undergo a regression during which he re-experiences a previous life as a doctor in early 20 century England.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Does the Bible contain hidden messages encoded within certain passages of the Old Testament? Is the prophetic nature of these 'codes' proof the Bible's author is of supernatural or extraterrestrial origin?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard interviews the expedition organizer who is planning on leading a team of scientists, filmmakers and tourists to the Arctic aboard a Russian nuclear ice-breaker in search of an entrance into the interior of our world.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets members of the 9/11 Truth movement who challenge the official version of events concerning the attack on the U.S. Pentagon. Researchers present evidence to suggest the attack was perpetrated by some rogue element inside the U.S. government.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard investigates claims that the supposed mastermind behind the 9/11 terrorist attacks and leader of the Al Qaeda terrorist cell remained a CIA asset until his death.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two investigative journalists and a natural health practitioner who maintain vaccines are neither safe nor effective.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Can radiation from electrical appliances, power lines, microwave ovens, and wireless technology such as cell phones, baby monitors, alter our DNA, and cause illnesses?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two alleged alien abductees about their claims they were taken aboard an alien space craft.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Museum of Anthropology, Mexico City
programme.desc: From ancient athletes who kick a severed head to a peasant dress that brings down an empire, discover the secrets inside the National Museum of Anthropology.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums, Berlin
programme.desc: From Vikings who break unbreakable swords to curators who solve the world’s hardest jigsaw puzzle, discover the secrets inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum, Vienna
programme.desc: From the alchemy of turning silver into gold to a dance craze that changed history, discover the secrets inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Palacio Real, Madrid
programme.desc: From a clock that runs on witchcraft to a 21st Century king who outfoxes a fascist, discover the secrets inside the Palacio Real.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem
programme.desc: From a scientist who recreates the crucifixion to an ancient amulet that proves Star Trek's Spock is Jewish, discover the secrets inside the Israel Museum.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Italia Wild
programme.desc: In Italy, George studies avalanches of Dolomite Mountains, meets engineers who keep Venice from sinking, and heads South to explore Italy's explosive volcanoes: Vesuvius, Etna and Stromboli.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Winds Of Autumn
programme.desc: This year he starts off by getting prepared in a wind tunnel, then he and his chase partner Mark Robinson head to Newfoundland for more wild weather action. Then, it's off to another encounter where the wild wind fans a raging inferno.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Weather Season
programme.desc: 2005 seemed to be the year that Earth went wild. Follow George as he brings us back to the site of his hairiest adventures from that year.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Defying Gravity
programme.desc: George experiences extremes of aviation and space training aboard Czech-built Albatross fighter jet, inside Zero-G plane, simulating zero gravity by diving 30,000 feet in giant parabolas and in spinning centrifuges producing 6 G's of force.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Crystal Cave
programme.desc: In 2000 in Chihuahua, Mexico, miners found a cave filled with giant crystals. Temperatures reach 120 degrees F and humidity nearly 100%. George leads an Explorers Club Flag Expedition into this extreme environment.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Waterspouts
programme.desc: In the Florida Keys, George uses a motorboat, a van and small plane to get up close to waterspouts - the nautical cousins of tornadoes. He also meets some of the 25 million alligators that live in the Sunshine State.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Polynesian Volcanoes
programme.desc: In New Zealand, George learns that an undersea volcano 1000 miles North in Tonga is creating a new island. After nautical mishaps, clad in nothing but underwear and a life jacket, George becomes one of the first explorers on this new land.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Costa Rica
programme.desc: George explores the volcanoes of Costa Rica with an international team of scientists, rafts down white water rivers in full flood, rappels down raging waterfalls, and handles some of deadliest snakes this tropical country has to offer.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Monsoon
programme.desc: In India's monsoon season George wades through waist-deep water in Bombay and leach-filled waterfalls in Goa, finds people being swept away by rivers, and rebuilding bridges. He experiences an intense annual Hindu celebration.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Highway to Hail
programme.desc: George and his team head into "bears' cage", looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones in Texas and Oklahoma. Their storm chasing vehicles don't look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Living In Space
programme.desc: How do astronauts cope with living in space? The unique environment, the lack of taste in their food and the smell of canned air all contribute to the stresses of living and working in space.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Danger, Astreroids Ahead
programme.desc: The question often rises is the cost of space exploration really worth it? Could the money be better spent elsewhere.

programme.title: The New Frontier: THE NEXT BIG LEAPS
programme.desc: Projects in the works. SunRISE, SPHEREx, NEOS and others, their mission to expand our knowledge of Earth, the surrounding space, Dark Matter, and the earliest galaxies. N

programme.title: The New Frontier: WEBB OF LIFE
programme.desc: The James Webb Space Telescope is now operational. Launched aboard an Arianne 5 the 10-billion-dollar spacecraft has deployed successfully and reached its orbit around the Sun.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Where Are All the Aliens?
programme.desc: We’re looking hard, but the numbers aren’t stacking up, is life on other planets that hard to find? Even signals from an advanced race elude us.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Flight Status
programme.desc: The latest updates on the new space hardware about to launch us into the next generation of space flight some rockets and capsules are on time others not so fortunate.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Getting There
programme.desc: Launching payloads into space is a very difficult task, historically rocket launches are the proverbial 'swords into ploughshares'.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Next Stop Mars
programme.desc: It has fired our imaginations for millennia, Mars, the God of War and the source of Man's science fictional demise.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Living Planet
programme.desc: With continuous observation of arth from orbit scientists have built a data set over time that reveals much about how the Earth breaths and life sustains itself on this living Planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: From There To Here
programme.desc: Series introduction and the study of Earth from orbit.

programme.title: Wild Asia: Two Worlds
programme.desc: A dramatic and poignant portrayal of the fragile alliances and desperate strategies for survival adopted by three species of animals caught in the no-man’s-land where the human and natural worlds collide.

programme.title: Wildest Middle East
programme.desc: Wildest Middle East reveals the remotest and most surprising corners of this ancient land, where you will find nothing is as it seems and where the natural world is fighting a constant battle to survive in an ever changing world.

programme.title: Wild Asia: Island Magic

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Philippines: Islands of Mystery

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.desc: Ian gets a call from a top Hollywood picture car coordinator and works his magic to get a vintage race car back in action.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.desc: Four brothers go on the run to escape a court order that would split them up.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 13

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: For many people, the most credible UFO reports are those raised by law enforcement. We investigate the most significant reports from police records.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 10
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Aliens Walk Among Us
programme.desc: Stories that suggest aliens are among us, including an Arizona woman who claims to have been fathered by an alien in a top-secret government experiment.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Mysterious Vanishings
programme.desc: Mysterious Vanishings: Baffling stories of people who vanished without a trace, including a young Tasmanian pilot who is chased by unidentified aircraft before disappearing.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner
programme.desc: Medical Mysteries: Medics at a hospital fall gravely ill after treating a mysteriously ailing patient in a circumstance that can't be explained by science. Or can it?

programme.title: Dynasty: The Collapse
programme.desc: Tensions between Krystle and Blake mount as their suspicions of one another grow. Claudia regrets sleeping with Adam. Dominique derails Alexis' attempt to buyout her company, but is unable to stop Brady's divorce proceedings.

programme.title: Dynasty: Life and Death
programme.desc: Dominique remains in critical condition after collapsing. Luke pays an unexpected visit to Steven. Blake tells his son that he will support him regardless of his sexual persuasion. Alexis calls her former lover, King Galen, a Middle Eastern monarch.

programme.title: Dynasty: Parental Consent
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to persuade King Galen to allow a marriage between Amanda and his son. She sweetens the offer by suggesting his country would receive a portion of Colbyco's revenues. Dominique advises Krystle to reconcile with Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty: Photo Finish
programme.desc: Alexis is relieved and Blake is concerned when Amanda suddenly changes her mind and decides to marry Prince Michael. Sammy Jo is revealed to be the culprit behind the compromising photographs.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Crash
programme.desc: Claudia flies to Mexico to divorce Steven. Unexpectedly, Adam appears at her hotel and they spend the night together. After Amanda embarrasses Prince Michael at Dominique's party, his patience is exhausted and he leaves her.

programme.title: Dynasty: Reconciliation
programme.desc: Blake and Daniel survive the plane crash. Jeff charters a helicopter and braves hazardous conditions to finally locate the wreckage. Krystle and Blake finally clear the air and renew their commitment to each other.

programme.title: War Story: Prisoners of the Sun
programme.desc: On 16 November 1941, two Canadian battalions arrived in the British colony of Hong Kong. Their aim: Bolster the Empire’s defenses in the event of aggression by the restless forces of Japan, stationed only kilometres away in occupied China.

programme.title: War Story: The Last Ship: The Sinking of the Esquimalt
programme.desc: On 16 April 1945, a mere three weeks before German surrender, the submarine fired a single torpedo that sank the last Canadian naval vessel lost to enemy action.

programme.title: War Story: Buchenwald Airmen
programme.desc: For two months in 1944, 168 Allied airmen were shot down over occupied France, betrayed to the Gestapo by the same collaborator, transported to the Nazi concentration and slave labour camp Buchenwald.

programme.title: War Story
programme.desc: In the longest campaign of the Second World War, from 1939 to 1945, German submarines desperately try to sever Britain’s shipping lifeline across the Atlantic Ocean. Canada plays the central role in the campaign.

programme.title: War Story: Not One Step Back: The Battle of Stalingrad
programme.desc: In the summer of 1942, the Germans advance to seize the rich oilfields of the Caucasus. In their path, the city of Stalingrad, its Soviet defenders personally ordered by Stalin to “take not one step back".

programme.title: War Story: Behind Enemy Lines
programme.desc: Royal Canadian Air Force bombing operations play a crucial role in disrupting German infrastructure ahead of the Normandy invasion of June 1944. In the process, dozens of Canadian airmen are forced to bail out over occupied Belgium and France.

programme.title: War Story: Whistle for a Tiffy
programme.desc: From D-Day, Tactical Air Force fighter-bombers played a pivotal role in Allied battlefield success; Canadian soldiers knew they could always “whistle for a Tiffy”.

programme.title: War Story: Surviving Dieppe
programme.desc: The Dieppe assault of 19 August 1942 is the worst day in Canadian military history: in just 8 hours, 907 Canadians were killed. For 2,000 of their comrades, nearly three years of incarceration in German prison camps followed.

programme.title: War Story: D-Day plus 1
programme.desc: The Canadian stand against the 12th SS Panzer Division Hitlerjugend immediately after D-Day allowed the Allies to switch to the offensive and truly begin the liberation of Europe.

programme.title: War Story: Falaise, the corridor of death
programme.desc: The Canadian army played the pivotal role in closing the Falaise Gap and ensuring Allied victory in the Normandy Campaign in August 1944.

programme.title: War Story: Where Hell is: The Leopold and the Scheldt
programme.desc: The Allies liberated Antwerp, the world’s largest deep-water port, on 4 September 1944, but it could only be accessed via the Scheldt Estuary, the perfect place for the Germans to make a stand.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Ayissha & Sydney
programme.desc: Sydney and Ayissha were in an online romance for years before Sydney revealed she is not who she says. But Ayissha still loves her and seeks Nev and Max's help. (S4, ep16)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Catfish is going international with a trip to the UK! Nev and Max meet Spencer who's been holding on to a secret for six years: he's in a relationship with a global pop star! (S5, ep15)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Steven & Samm
programme.desc: Steven is due to graduate high school, instead of planning for college he wants to move to California for his online love, Samm. Steven's mum is sceptical of Samm's identity. (S4, ep10)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Artis & Jess
programme.desc: Five months ago Artis met Jess online. Artis and Jess each were in relationships, but believed they'd found true love. But is Jess everything that she says she is?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Dorion & Jeszica
programme.desc: Dorion is about to give up everything for online love Jeszica, including his relationship with girlfriend Raffinee. But first he wants to know, is Jeszica really the girl in the pictures?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kim & Matt
programme.desc: Kim's been pouring her heart out to Matt for over 10 years. Now, Kim's facing a life-changing decision - should she marry her current boyfriend or find out if Matt is her soul mate?

programme.title: The Hills: I Want You To Be With Me / It's Her Move
programme.desc: Lauren tries to make peace between Brody and Stephanie. Audrina wants to make things work with Corey, but Justin won't give up on her. (S4, ep12)

programme.title: The City: Boys Night Out

programme.title: The City: He Never Said He Had a Girlfriend

programme.title: The City: The Truth Hurts

programme.title: The City: Mingling with the Commoners

programme.title: The City: Unexpected Roommates

programme.title: The Hills: Back To New York / One Last Chance
programme.desc: Whitney travels to New York expecting to reconnect with Alex, but a new boy named Jay steals her away. Heidi is miserable after being fired, and Spencer is making matters worse. (S4, ep14)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Execution

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Play

programme.desc: The former dictator of a Caribbean island is made to have hallucinatory visions in which he sees his ominous destiny as part of an ingenious plot designed by the Impossible Missions Force.

programme.desc: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.desc: By Night & By Day: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: Terror of The World
programme.desc: Terror of the World: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: It took only six weeks for the Nazi Army to conquer France, with an onslaught of tanks, aircraft and German troops. Witness the extraordinary military success of the Blitzkrieg campaign, through rare footage and firsthand accounts.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Germany launched Operation Barbarossa, a savage and merciless attack on the Soviet Union. Now, newly colorised film and amateur home movies provide an unprecedented inside look at this brutal conflict.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Anchor Anger
programme.desc: The rivalry between captains Dave Carraro and Tyler McLaughlin intensifies, while other boats in the fleet push to bring new mates up tospeed in the North Atlantic Bluefin fishing season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bluefin Beatdown
programme.desc: An old rivalry re- ignites after a fight at the dock between captains Tyler McLaughlin and Dave Carraro, of FV- tuna.com, while a crewmember fights to keep his job on the Hot Tuna.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Harpoon Hellraising
programme.desc: It's week four of the North Atlantic Blue Fin Tuna Season and oneveteran Gloucester captain has yet to catch his first fish, while two rival harpoon boats go head to head.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Go Hard or Go Home
programme.desc: It's week five of Gloucester's Bluefin tuna fishing season, and when a sudden storm engulfs the fleet, each captain must decide if the risk of staying out on the water is worth the reward.

programme.title: Bent Rods and Broken Hearts
programme.desc: It's week six of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season and the Gloucester fleet's underdogs struggle to turn around their seasons.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Maine Event, The
programme.desc: It's week seven of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, Gloucester captains must decide whether go where the fish are biting or take their chances fishing inshore.

programme.title: Wardens: September in the UP
programme.desc: Two Michigan conservation officers patrol bear hunters, waterfowlers, and ORV operators in the state's Upper Peninsula during the busy month of September. Also, a look at volunteers cutting shooting lanes for an accessible blind.

programme.title: Wardens: Whitefish and ORVs
programme.desc: One Michigan conservation officer patrols users of off-road vehicles during the Memorial Day weekend. Other officers check on whitefish anglers in chilly conditions. Also, a look into a walleye survey at a large inland lake in the UP.

programme.title: Wardens: Winter Recreation and Firearm Deer
programme.desc: A Michigan conservation officer in D-7 checks on snowmobilers and ice anglers during a chilly February weekend. Another officer in D-7 and one in D-1 check on hunters during the firarm deer season.

programme.title: Wardens: Deer, Foraging, and Scenarios
programme.desc: Two Michigan conservation officers in the state's District 8 look into a case of trespassing and violating the safety zone law during the firarm deer season. Two experts in wild mushroom foraging go hunting for edibles and share their knowledge.

programme.title: Wardens: Firearm Deer and Patriot Award
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers in the southeast part of the state check on deer hunters that may be trespassing and within the safety zone of an occupied dwelling during the firearm deer season.

programme.title: Wardens: Firearm Deer and Fowl
programme.desc: A Michigan conservation officer looks into an illegal deer during firearm deer season. The state's DNR offers tips on how to bag a bear, and conservation officer recruits receive lessons in operating snowmobiles.

programme.title: Wardens: Firearm Deer and Michigan Sturgeon
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers in both the Upper and Lower Peninsulas monitor hunters during the firearm deer seaon, as well as a look at the state's efforts to help the sturgeon population in state waters.

programme.title: Wardens: Firearm Deer and Michigan Sturgeon
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers in both the Upper and Lower Peninsulas monitor hunters during the firearm deer seaon, as well as a look at the state's efforts to help the sturgeon population in state waters.

programme.title: Wardens: Walleye and Women
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers patrol walleye anglers on the Detroit River and a DNR class focuses on getting more women into the outdoors.

programme.title: Wardens: Michigan Conservation Officers
programme.desc: Outdoor Channel donates a check for a memorial to honor fallen conservation officers, and a look at what it takes to be a Michigan CO as well as some of the out-of-the-box missions that the job requires.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Caviar
programme.desc: Region 7 wardens converge upon the Intake fishing access site on the Yellowstone River as the annual paddlefish migration is in full swing. Watch anglers snag paddlefish and Wardens snag illegal anglers!

programme.title: Alien Paranormal: Bigfoot, UFOs and the Men in Black
programme.desc: Are Bigfoot creatures traveling to earth in UFO's, and being covered-up by Men in Black? Experience terrifying, real events as documented by top authorities, including: Aliens attacking a house; Alien Abductions to create a hybrid race; vortexes and more!

programme.title: Alien Crash at Roswell
programme.desc: The most enigmatic UFO incident in history exposed. Join Philip Coppens, star of History Channel's "Ancient Aliens" series in this and unprecedented expose on the Roswell Incident revealing that there is much more to this case than previously believed.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens and the New World Order 2
programme.desc: Recent discoveries reveal that a highly advanced race of extraterrestrial beings came to Earth in our ancient past, but the shocking realization is that they are still here now, among us and may have a sinister agenda beyond our wildest imaginations.

programme.title: Ancient Alien Origins
programme.desc: Researchers discover that aliens from another world assisted in the evolution of man and were the genesis of a very real bloodline that remains intact today.

programme.title: Close Encounters: Proof of Alien Contact
programme.desc: This documentary examines whether UFOs are real. It studies over 250 amateur video clips, evaluates several recent revelations about Roswell, and examines footage of the removal of an alien implant.

programme.title: Arthur: Castles in the Sky/Tipping the Scales
programme.desc: The gang is devastated after their tree house collapses. Can architect Frank Gehry help them to rebuild? Everyone in Arthur's chorus group is excited about their upcoming performance in Crown City.

programme.title: Arthur: He Said, He Said/Bunny Trouble
programme.desc: A special episode of Bionic Bunny is interrupted, and Arthur and friends try to remember what comes next. D.W. is excited to be taking care of the class bunny, Larry. But Larry is feeling adventurous and and wanders off.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Spaces Out/The Long Road Home
programme.desc: Inspired by footage of the moon landing, Buster wants to go to outer space someday! For now, it'd be cool to build and launch a rocket! Then, after costing Lakewood Elementary the win in a relay race, George wants to redeem himself.

programme.title: Arthur: Fernlets by Fern/Prunella and the Haunted Locker
programme.desc: Muffy talks Fern into writing poems for a new line of greeting cards which becomes the hit of Elwood City, but booming business causes Fern to burn out. Prunella is assigned a new school locker, which is rumored to be haunted!

programme.title: Arthur: Dear Adil/Bitzi's Break-Up
programme.desc: Arthur is worried that his letters to his new Turkish pen pal, Adil, will be boring. After all, how can Elwood City compare to Arthur's fantastical ideas about Turkey? Bitzi is breaking up with her boyfriend, and Buster is really sad.

programme.title: Arthur: Sleep No More/Pet Peeved
programme.desc: Buster is convinced that Pizza Paula's all-you-can-eat contest is his destiny. But how can he possibly win such an important contest without any sleep? Binky volunteers to look after Francine's cat, Nemo, for the weekend.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W., All Fired Up/I'd Rather Read It Myself
programme.desc: When Ms. Morgan announces they'll be having a fire drill during preschool, D.W. wants no part of it--it sounds way too scary. Then, the Tibble Twins are better than D.W. at just about everything.

programme.title: Arthur: Phony Fern/Brain's Shocking Secret
programme.desc: When Fern's parents give her a cell phone for emergencies, she soon becomes hooked on it. Brain is the smartest kid in class. Everyone knows that! What they don't know is that he was kept back in Kindergarten. Will Binky spill the beans?

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen Gets Her Goose Cooked/Best of The Nest
programme.desc: Sue Ellen is the champion of the popular Internet game, Virtualgoose.com, but she’s become obsessed! And now the gang has moved onto Best of the Nest. Will any of his friends be willing to forgo their computers for a real, live adventure?

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Big Little Day
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. And by the end of the day, the kids have learned that big or little, they're all wonderful just the way they are!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Hot! It's Cold!
programme.desc: Throughout the day, Barney and the children learn about "hot" and "cold," but the fun really begins when Barney turns the playground into a winter/summer wonderland!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Riff find a pirate map, but in order to find the treasure, they have to be able to count. It’s time for a music concert in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A New Friend
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: As he watches birds fly overhead, Riff begins to daydream of flying himself. After seeing all the Moms playing with their kids in the Park, Baby Bop wonders what makes somebody a Mommy.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Once Upon a Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Mario is trying to write his very own fairy tale. The children help by acting out some of their favorite fairy tales to give Mario some ideas.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Splish! Splash!
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Blame Game - Airplanes
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an art show project that Melanie has made. Afraid that she will be angry, he doesn't say anything, but then feels guilty. Barney helps him see that honesty and taking responsibility for what we do is always best. together.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Darkness Rising: Part 5
programme.desc: The ultimate showdown unfolds in Earth's orbit as the Decepticons, aided by Megatron's undead army, do battle with the Autobots with the fate of the Earth hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Masters and Students
programme.desc: While Optimus Prime and Bumblebee square off against Skyquake, Starscream encounters challenges to his leadership at every turn.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Scrapheap
programme.desc: Bulkhead, Bumblebee and Ratchet scramble to eliminate a swarm of Scraplets that have invaded Autobot base while Optimus and Arcee patrol in the Arctic.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Con Job
programme.desc: Bulkhead eagerly anticipates a visit from his old friend Wheeljack, but when his buddy arrives, things are not as they seem.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Convoy
programme.desc: The Autobots assist Agent Fowler in transporting a hazardous explosive device, but this time they come under attack from more than just the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Deus Ex Machina
programme.desc: Miko and Bulkhead head to Greece on a field trip to recover an Energon Harvester; unfortunately, class is also in session for new Decepticons Knock Out and Breakdown.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Speed Metal
programme.desc: Trying to impress a girl and get even with the school bully, Jack convinces Bumblebee to help him win a street race; but the action speeds out of control with the arrival of Knock Out.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Predatory
programme.desc: Arcee takes Jack along on a seemingly routine mission, but encounters an archenemy and must face her deepest fears.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Sick Mind
programme.desc: Optimus Prime becomes infected with a Decepticon plague, and Arcee and Bumblebee must sneak aboard the Decepticon warship to find the formula for the cure.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Out of His Head
programme.desc: Megatron remains a fixture inside Bumblebee's mind and manipulates his actions back at Autobot base.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Shadowzone
programme.desc: The kids accidentally become stuck inside an alternate dimension during a GroundBridge malfunction. To make matters worse, they're trapped with a reanimated Skyquake!

programme.title: Property Brothers: Chase & Jessica

programme.title: Property Brothers: Tyler & Lindsay
programme.desc: Tyler and Lindsay love their waterfront lifestyle, but their tiny condo is giving them the squeeze. They desperately need a family home where they can put down roots, but finding a property requires compromises.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Dorothy & John
programme.desc: Busy parents Dorothy and John have been crashing in his parents’ basement, and with baby number two on the way they’re desperate to find a home of their own. It’s a race against time, and the Property Brothers step in.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Monique & Carl
programme.desc: Monique and coach Carl have been house hunting for five long years, but since he’s fixated on a move-in ready mansion their search could drag on forever.

programme.desc: Busy parents Kevin and Shirley desperately want to cut down their daily commute so they can spend more time with their daughters and one another.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Barbra & Greg

programme.desc: While investigating the theft of a rare telescope, the Astro-Viewer, the Turtles discover odd tracks leading away from the National Space Exploration Centre.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): State of Shock
programme.desc: After defeating a mysterious group of ninjas at the Emeryville Power Station, the Turtles decode part of a map that they were able to liberate from the would-be thieves.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cry H.A.V.O.C.!
programme.desc: The Turtles get the drop on masked thieves hijacking a jewellery store, only to have themselves arrested for the crime! Before the turtles can be booked, they are rescued by the mutants Amok and Overdrive.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): H.A.V.O.C. in the Streets!
programme.desc: Titanus sends of couple of his H.A.V.O.C.mutants to bust into the aerospace plant and steal some much needed equipment. Only problem is that the Turtles were waiting for them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtle Trek

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Unknown Ninja
programme.desc: While watching video tapes of old battles, Raphael sees a mystery person spying on them. While the Turtles investigate, an alien warlord named Dregg sends his TechnoGansters to steal all the gold on Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Dregg of the Earth
programme.desc: April contacts the Turtles to let them know that Dregg has landed on Earth and is preparing a press conference. The Turtles rush to meet April at the Park, where they hear Dregg announce his intentions and offers the world his molecular converter.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Wrath of Medusa
programme.desc: Believing that the Turtles are the only thing that stands between him and total domination of the planet, Dregg makes contact with Medusa, a sinisterly beautiful alien.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Showdown

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Noo-Noo tidies up Home hill before the Teletubbies slide up the slide to watch Natalie tell us about her brother's christening. A magic cloud with magic powers rains special magic flowers all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children spin around on a carousel. In Teletubbyland a voice trumpet rises and the Teletubbies dance round and round the controls.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy is out for a walk when a strong wind blows his hat away. The hat disappears into Home Hill, but Dipsy doesn't know where it has gone. Noo Noo blows the hat back out of Home Hill to Dipsy, who is very happy.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play with their favourite things, until the windmill shows them it's time to watch some children learn about the number one. The Teletubbies are supposed to be in bed, but they would rather play outside.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It's time for Dipsy to have some Tubby Toast. The Teletubbies watch some children have fun in their paddling pool on a sunny day.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a Spanish girl play her violin for her friends. In Teletubbyland the Teletubbies watch Po dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A group of children sing some Christmas carols to the Teletubbies. Tinky Winky opens his present to find a beautiful star inside.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies play a bumping bottoms game. They stop to watch some children play some ball games. Laa-Laa’s ball goes in a puddle, she tries to get it back but can’t reach it.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance round the Dome, but stop to watch Zoe collect some things in her Treasure Box for her sister Sophie. In Teletubbyland, Dipsy hears magical music and sees a cloud.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Andy Brown and two children watch a robin in the garden. The Teletubbies are 'Calling Out!' Laa-Laa calls to Dipsy who is very far away, then they call to Tinky Winky.

programme.title: Homes and Playgrounds
programme.desc: Join Bob and his “Can-Do” crew as they go back on site to show you the exciting real world of big machines! From bird’s nests to houses, we all need a home and in this brand new adventure Bob explains how they are built.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: There is great excitement at Bob’s yard when his new metal detector is delivered. He plans to use it to find a burst pipe in Farmer Pickles’ field, and promises Muck that afterwards they will hunt for buried treasure.

programme.title: Green Builds and Recycling Centres
programme.desc: Bob’s back On Site! Join Bob as he shows you the amazing world of eco homes and recycling centres and learn how things you throw away can be used to make something new.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Pam Goody is running out of money to complete the Arts Centre renovations and Molly suggests holding a fashion show to raise funds. Pam thinks this a wonderful idea and asks Molly to organise it. Bob is, of course, just the man to build a catwalk.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and team are building a barn for Farmer Pickles’ sheep, which has to be ready for the lambing season. Farmer Pickles brings the sheep down from the hills and puts them in a pen until the barn is finished.

programme.title: When Bob Became a Builder
programme.desc: It’s a beautiful day in Sunflower Valley and Bob and his machine team are building a new picnic area at the beach. Dizzy, Lofty and Scrambler are clearing stuff that’s been washed up on the beach, while Benny has a great time digging with Scoop and Muck.

programme.title: Built to be Wild

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has volunteered to look after the farm whilst Farmer Pickles takes Humpty to a pig show. Bob arrives with Lofty at the crack of dawn whilst Wendy is due later to repair the roof on the barn.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are taking a break from building so they can tidy-up all the left over materials from around the Valley. Farmer Pickles asks Bob if he’ll put together Scruffty’s new kennel. Bob’s got a busy morning but agrees to build the kennel later on.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop and the machines are in Sunflower Valley setting up Wendy’s caravan. Scoop contacts Muck to find out where Bob has got to. Muck explains that they haven’t left Bobsville yet because they’ve lost Bob’s Dad!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Bentley is organising a winter fair in the town hall square and enlists Bob to help set up the stalls, lights and the centrepiece of the fair – a giant inflatable Santa Claus.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Sheila Hancock takes on Sandi Toksvig around the Isle of Wight--Sheila's birthplace--visiting a globe-making firm and saucy postcard museum. Philip Serrell and David Barby lend a hand with buying and selling at auction in Tunbridge Wells.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Journalists Bill Turnbull and Louise Minchin, more used to the BBC Breakfast couch than antiquing, compete with the help of Philip Serrell and David Barby. They begin in greater Manchester and end up at auction in Bridgenorth, Shropshire.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charles Hansun and Thomas Plant help TV and radio legend David "Diddy" Hamilton and journalist Kate Silverton hunt for hidden treasure. Starting in Newark, they take in Ruddington, Nottingham and Derby, finishing in Chiswick, west London.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Neil Stuke and Penny Smith hit the road with £400, shopping in Herefordshire with help from Paul Laidlaw and Thomas Plant and diversions to a cider museum and puppetry archive. At the auction in Newport, Shropshire, who will win the day?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actors Laila Rouass and Charles Dale battle their way around the north of England for eccentric antiques they hope will turn a profit. James Lewis and Paul Laidlaw are there to help as they travel from York via Leeds to auction in Chertsey.

programme.title: Darts
programme.desc: Full session replay of World Seniors Darts Champion of Champions Preliminary Round & Quarterfinals.

programme.title: Break of Throw: The Whitlocks
programme.desc: The throws of father and son Simon and Mason Whitlock go under the microscope in this episode of Break of Throw.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Mikuru Suzuki and Kirsty Hutchinson
programme.desc: Ten-time World Champion Trina Gulliver analyses the throwing styles of Mikuru Suzuki and Kirsty Hutchinson.

programme.title: The Darts Swap Challenge

programme.title: Super Series Staff Vs The Bullseye Challenge
programme.desc: Super Series staff face off in the Bullseye challenge in this exciting showdown!

programme.title: On the Oche
programme.desc: Damon Heta joins Jake Kenyon for a chuck and a chat.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Image of Guadalupe, Stahl's Paintings, UD: Lost Generation, Biker & The Vet & UD and Donut Murder.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Missing Cheek, Identical Twins, Ghost Blimp, Greeting Card, Update: Lifesaving Sister and New Orleans Killer.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: D.B. Cooper (Pts. 1 & 2), Richard's Rampage, Log Cabin Fraud, Chair of Death and Wood I Lie To You.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Lightning Family, Film Student's Death, Born to Kill and Vampire Kids & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Update: Where's Kari?, Amelia Earhart (Pts. 1 & 2), Richard's Rampage & UD and Miami Vice & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Fatherly Love, Good Samaritan Abductor, Halloween Party Death, Update: Meredith's Mother, Carwash Kidnap and Children from Heaven.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lock Keepers Haunting at Lock 91
programme.desc: Sean heads to Manchester to investigate a lock keeper's cottage that was built in 1804. It appears that the spirits are still watching over the building and terrifying its customers.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Leeds and investigates Abbey House Museum among a maze of Victorian streets and shops. Who will he bump into tonight and what secrets does this location hold?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at Abbey House Museum and ventures outside into the monastery ruins. Will he find the ghostly monk tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Evil Cook at The Shakespeare Pub
programme.desc: Sean explores The Shakespeare pub in Manchester and meets Flecky Bennett to investigate claims dating back hundreds of years, about an evil chef that is haunting the pub.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Strange Things at Owd Betts
programme.desc: Sean heads to Rochdale and investigates strange paranormal reports at Owd Betts. Something spooky lurks in the basement and it seems Sean is not alone as he investigates the main bar.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken Out
programme.desc: Was Donovan Reidy deliberately run down and left to die? In 1995, 23-year-old Donovan Reidy was at a party when he got into a fight. A short while later, his bloodied body was found on the side of a major New Zealand highway.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: 19-year-old Joan Wech left New Zealand for the bright lights of Sydney. But the first step on her overseas adventure would be her last. Was this a robbery gone wrong, a savage random attack or a revenge killing by a jealous ex-lover?

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of murdered Christchurch scrap-metal dealer, John Reynolds, to discover his killer and reveal the truth surrounding the violent attack.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Lie of the Land
programme.desc: Sue Nicholson and Deb Webber investigate one of the most complex and intriguing cases ever featured - did Waikato man Jason Dark commit suicide or was he murdered, as his family believes?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Darker Learning
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS has been called to investigate Southern Vermont College in Bennington, Vermont. The legend of a mysterious love triangleand suicidescould be at the root of frightening paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Innocent Until Proven Dead
programme.desc: TAPS has been called to Louisville, Kentucky to help three descendants find out if their ancestors arestill inhabitingthe property they owned in the 1800's.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Rockets Red Scare
programme.desc: TAPS travels back in time, to the 1700's to investigate the renowned USS Constitution, \\"Old Ironsides\\", which is docked in Boston, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: 1st Edition Apparition
programme.desc: TAPS is revisiting Edith Wharton's home, The Mount, in Lenox, Massachusetts. It's believed Edith andher husband could be behind increased activity since the team's last investigation in 2008.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: All Aboard the Ghost Train
programme.desc: This historic roundhouse and rail yard is connected to more that just old trains. The frightening remnants of a serial killer, horrific accidents and one of the worst train crashes have two people questioning strange encounters.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Sickness
programme.desc: Something is making Lisa and her family sick. Is it natural or paranormal? Ryan and the team uncover the tragic history surrounding Lisa's home--with shocking connections to respiratory illness.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Good Vs. Evil
programme.desc: PRS visits a western Pennsylvania couple wracked by a torrent of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Bedroom Eyes
programme.desc: PRS travels to rural Pennsylvania to investigate a haunting that began after a new couple moved into an old family farm.?Over the next three days, hidden tragedies are uncovered and latent psychic abilities are revealed.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghosts of the Forgotten
programme.desc: The PRS investigation into the haunted Lake County Poor House becomes a journey through one PRS team members? troubled past.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Do Bad Things
programme.desc: After receiving a letter requesting PRS' help, Ryan and the team head to Ohio to help a grieving family and determine if the family's house contributed to the untimely death of a daughter.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vegas
programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Ladder
programme.desc: A large family in Shrewsbury, MA, has been living with a spirit for the last 40 years. To most of the siblings, the entity is menacing and evil, but Sandy seems to have a different connection.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Sex Dungeon
programme.desc: Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey and Chad Calek join PRS for this unusual case of a sprawling mansion on Greyhaven Island near Detroit. Ken, the owner, hears voices and banging and it has him feeling both watched and cursed; a prisoner in his own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Freshmen Fear
programme.desc: A young female student claims to have seen a ghost in her dorm room.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hack Green Bunker
programme.desc: Gregg enters the bunker for the first time and feels its energy. Has he caught the voice of the mysterious woman that some believe was murdered there?

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Eden Camp Museum
programme.desc: Once a prison camp during WWII, Eden Camp is now a museum housing many an artefact and many a ghost. Karl enters the cottage to face the spirits that are said to haunt this once family home.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hickleton Hall
programme.desc: Once a grand mansion, this huge property is now very much passed it previous grandeur. Stuart investigates the long empty corridors alone and something seems to be following him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hack Green Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: Karl and Stuart head to Hack Green Bunker and witness, first hand, the paranormal activity that regularly occurs there.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Charlton House
programme.desc: Karl investigates Carlton house library for the first time and quickly realises that he is not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Borwick Hall P1
programme.desc: Karl enters Borwick Hall for the first time as he investigates the upper floors.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Borwick Hall P2
programme.desc: Our investigation into Borwick Hall continues as Stuart investigates the middle floors.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Nightmare, The Stalker, The Impossible Car Dream, The Dresser, The Burial.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 4

programme.title: Mermicorno: Starfall

programme.title: Mermicorno: Starfall

programme.title: Mermicorno: Starfall
programme.desc: The Mermi-Crew set out searching for Valentina but soon realise that while finding her is easy, getting her to leave is hard.

programme.title: Mermicorno: Starfall

programme.title: Mermicorno: Starfall

programme.title: Mermicorno: Starfall
programme.desc: As the Mermi-Crew readies to face Ika again, they're met with a surprise that may help their mission, or cause them to fail entirely.

programme.title: Mermicorno: Starfall

programme.title: Mermicorno: Starfall
