programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The gang have a snow tower and a group of friends and it sounds like a recipe for a fun game. Even Bear caved to the pressure and joined Masha, Rosie, and Penguin as they figure out who will be the princess.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Spring has dawned and the birds have arrived, but a pigeon settles in the birdhouse near Bear's house. Masha is obviously more than happy to look after him, making him her new pet.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear has made a new purchase: he has bought a brand new motorcycle. Now, as a cool biker, he plans on impressing She-Bear, but she does not seem to like him or his motorcycle very much.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: On a nice summer's day Bear, as usual, goes fishing and Masha follows alongside. But the fishing trip didn't quite work out: the forest dwellers made a beach at Bear's favourite spot. Masha is glad to have the opportunity to swim.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Rosie has lost her peace because of the ripe, appetising acorns growing right above her little snout. To get the desired but inaccessible delicacy, she must jump above her head or simply learn how to fly.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, and the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favourite team. However, Masha gets bored while waiting for a goal so she goes outside looking for one.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The wolves are going to cook borscht under Masha's guidance. They have a cookbook, a big pot and a ravenous appetite. But they still have to get the ingredients. It seems that the newly-minted culinary specialists will get something interesting.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear's old circus friend Tiger comes over for a visit because there is nothing more wonderful than passionately play chess with your best friend. But Masha has her own idea of a good time.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: When Masha and Penguin enjoy a new game together, the pair go on a fun-filled adventure that sees them travel to Mars before heading out to the open sea to visit the Frog Princess.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha becomes a personal trainer to a group of bees who are eating too many sweets.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: A mysterious night visitor terribly frightens the Bear and makes a real mess in his house. Masha knows the best way to overcome fear is to play with an invisible house spirit, but first he needs to be caught.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha and the Bear argue over which colour is the most beautiful and a wall grew between them. Now the former friends set off in search of new friends, all of which turns into an exhausting competition.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: When forest orderlies are powerless, dealing with a real epidemic is not an easy task. However, Masha gets down to business, which means everything will work out with the main thing being perky laughter.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The Bear has a rival for winter fishing: a cat with the latest equipment. An unspoken competition begins between them and it is unclear if the latest miracle of technology will win out of the time-tested method.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha is again playing mother and daughter with Rosie, but this time the roles are distributed differently. Now it's Masha's turn to put on her cap and get in the stroller. Rosie tries to endure mother's everyday life.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha finds someone's umbrella in the forest and decides that she needs to return it urgently. After a fun search, the owner of the umbrella is found, but for some reason, they are still dissatisfied.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Christmas is a time of miracles and gifts and all the inhabitants of the forest have prepared performances for Santa Claus, but Masha was the best prepared, but the good wizard may not have enough gifts for her.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The ever-hungry Wolves managed to unhook a huge tank for transporting live fish from the train. But there is a strange passenger among the fish.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear's closet is full of strange and wildly interesting things. Masha and Panda find a very interesting thing there, which becomes a real puzzle for them.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The clouds look airy and similar to different sweets, probably very tasty. Masha and the Bear decide to take to the skies and try the airy dessert.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Rosie has a herbarium and Bear has a collection of rare stamps. Masha wants to collect something, but she just cannot figure out what exactly.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Rosie the Pig develops an incomprehensible rash after falling into a nettle bush.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The Wolves find someone's pineapple in the forest. The temptation to eat it is stronger than the desire to find the real owner, until Masha appears at their table.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The Bear and the other forest inhabitants are puzzled, huge circles appear in the field near the forest. Moreover, Masha's goat disappears.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha learns to perform tricks, like, a wave of the hands, a secret spell, but instead of a cute dove, a completely different bird flies out of the magic cylinder.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The Bear is going on a romantic date with the Female Bear. The picnic promises to be perfect because all there are fragrant lilacs all around.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: An unpleasant incident in the forest leaves the Bunny homeless. The hospitable Bear decides to shelter Bunny in his home.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and his friends catch a bottle containing a map. Pingu and his sister take the record player outside. A classmate throws a paper airplane, and Pingu gets the blame.

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is delighted when he receives a Valentine card. Pingu tries to sleep, but his sister is snoring. Pingu bounces on everything in the igloo. The siblings argue over their toys.

programme.title: Pingu

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: When a wisecracking black hustler from South Central L.A. finds himself transported back to medieval England, he leads the overthrow of an evil king and wins the heart of a proto feminist woman.

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: George is a retired soccer pro whose glory days are behind him. Burnt out on his playboy lifestyle and bankrupted by a string of bad investments, he moves back to Virginia to reconnect with his estranged ex-wife and neglected son.

programme.title: Cold Souls: Cold Souls
programme.desc: Paul is an actor who feels bogged down by his participation in a production of Chekov's play, Vanya.

programme.title: Guess Who
programme.desc: A sarcastic father (Bernie Mac) has plenty to say about his daughter wanting to marry a white boy (Ashton Kutcher).

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Blotto
programme.desc: Stan must lie to his wife to go out with Ollie.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Sons Of The Desert
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie's wives find out they've been tricked into believing they're on a medical cruise.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Block Heads
programme.desc: Unaware that the Great War has ended, Stan remains faithfully at his post for twenty years

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Hog Wild
programme.desc: Hog Wild is a 1930 American pre-Code Laurel and Hardy film, directed by James Parrott.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Busy Bodies
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie battle inanimate objects, coworkers, and the laws of physics in a sawmill.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Berth Marks
programme.desc: Stanley and Oliver stumble into the wrong sleeping compartment on the train to Pottsville.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Perfect Day

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Nice Ones Always Die First
programme.desc: Bat's brother Ed arrives in Dodge City broke and needing a job. Bat doesn't believe he has the ability to be a good lawman and doesn't want to hire him.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Old Jake
programme.desc: Earp spots old buffalo hunter Jake Caster in a saloon. Jake now lives with his wife's tribe, the Cheyenne, but Earp wonders if Jake has changed his ways.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Equalizer
programme.desc: Kelley opens a hardware store with gunsmith Guns McCallum. Guns has a short temper so Earp and Kelley become worried when a gunfighter has an issue with him.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Beautiful Friendship
programme.desc: The Judge, Bat, and Kelley want Earp to run Doc and Kate Holliday out of Dodge City but Earp doesn't want to as Doc saved his life and has committed no crime.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Plague Carrier
programme.desc: Earp and Dr. McCarty urge a doctor to open a practice in Dodge City but when smallpox breaks out they learn he isn't licensed.

programme.title: John Wayne: An Innocent Man

programme.title: John Wayne: Cold Vengeance
programme.desc: After seeing his father gunned down, a young man vows to bring the desperados to justice. In Vibrant Color! Starring: John Wayne, Marion Burns, Dennis Moore

programme.title: 500 mph Storm
programme.desc: When an energy experiment goes haywire, a rash of massive hurricanes rips across North America. A scientist must get his family to safety before the hurricanes merge, creating a "hypercane" with the power to wipe America off the map.

programme.title: Triple Cross: Triple Cross
programme.desc: During WW2, convicted bank robber Eddie Chapman becomes a triple agent working for both the British and the Germans.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: When Nathan (Taylor Lautner) discovers the parents who raised him aren't his real folks, he begins to uncover unsettling secrets that trigger events and leave him running for his life.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: When Patricia is called to identify a body, she’s shocked to find her mirror image lying dead on a gurney. Determined to find out more about her surprise ‘twin’ and simultaneously, help her mother clear her father's name.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Sterling Brooks, a self-absorbed stock broker, is killed in a freak golfing accident. In order to secure a heavenly future, Sterling is given the opportunity to help a needy young girl reunite with her family in time for Christmas.

programme.title: Fair Game
programme.desc: A riveting thriller inspired by the experiences of real-life CIA officer Valerie Plame, whose identity was revealed after her husband questioned the U.S. involvement in Iraq.

programme.title: Area Q
programme.desc: After his son disappears a journalist goes to Brazil to investigate, where he discovers close encounter sightings that have taken place in a region known as Area Q, where he may uncover the mystery surrounding his son's disappearance.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: A man discovers that he possesses the ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world.

programme.title: G-Loc
programme.desc: In a world on the brink of environmental collapse, mass migration to neighbouring planet, Rhea, is humanity's final hope for survival.

programme.title: Switched
programme.desc: Tired of being bullied, Cassandra Evans prays that her nemesis, Katie Sharp, the queen bee of social media, would know what it's like to walk a day in her shoes. Her prayer is answered in an unexpected way when they get "Switched."

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: A raven-haired enchantress, Cassie Nightingale, mysteriously moves into the local haunted mansion, 'Grey House', and seems to change her neighbors lives using a hint of magic causing many to think she’s a witch.

programme.title: The Secret Garden
programme.desc: Experience the magical world of 'The Secret Garden' as never before in this beautiful production of the classic tale. When her parents are lost in a tragic accident, Mary must seek comfort in the strange and forgotten corridors of Misselthwaite Factory.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Queen Bee
programme.desc: Dracula infiltrates the Queen Bee's hive in an effort to thwart a worldwide bee invasion.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Mr. Mephisto
programme.desc: Confusion abounds when Mr. Mephisto replaces Mayor Goldwyn with a lookalike doll who spouts off radical opinions.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Tickler
programme.desc: The Tickler passes off counterfeit bills in an attempt to lure the Monster Squad into a trap.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Ringmaster
programme.desc: The Ringmaster holds children hostage as part of a larger scheme to buy out and close down all of the toy stores in America.

programme.title: Monster Squad
programme.desc: Frank and Dracula sign up for music lessons in an attempt to foil the mad musicians who robbed a telethon.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Astrologer
programme.desc: During a newscast, The Astrologer announces that an earthquake is about to devastate the land, and to ensure his prediction comes true, he makes plans to detonate an atomic bomb.

programme.title: The Last Man on Earth
programme.desc: When a disease turns all of humanity into the living dead, the last man on earth becomes a reluctant vampire hunter.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Adam witnesses a murder online while participating in a webchat with a stranger.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A decomposed body is found on a rooftop.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A sniper begins a campaign of random shootings in the city.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac continues the investigation into the murder of Chief Carver's sister.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A department store manager is found dead inside his store's holiday window display,

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigate when a bakery owner is gunned down on his own premises.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Smooth Criminal
programme.desc: A suave and charming hitman lead the team to uncover a conspiracy.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Kill Clause

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A body falls from the sky and the team discover it is from a commercial space flight.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Backfire
programme.desc: The team tries to determine the cause of a house fire.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Meltdown

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Time Bomb

programme.title: CSI: Miami: All Fall Down
programme.desc: A serial killer is on the loose, leaving his mark on the chests of his victims.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston and Riley are taken hostage during the aftermath of a shootout in an usually calm Las Vegas community.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston is shocked when his former student is found murdered and becomes the focus of a CSI investigation into the world of Mexican wrestling.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Nick's case of a deceased skydiver takes an interesting turn when Catherine discovers there may be a connection between the skydiver and a mysterious double murder case.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When Hodges and Wendy run into each other at a science fiction convention for one of their favorite classic television shows, they end up investigating the murder of one of their beloved actors.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine revisits one of the very first cases she worked as a CSI when the convicted felon in the murder claims the verdict was based on faulty evidence.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: An unexplained illness that is affecting random citizens of Las Vegas baffles the CSIs.

programme.title: Scorpion: Queen Scary
programme.desc: At Halloween, Team Scorpion takes on a case to prove the existence of ghosts on the Queen Mary but find an all-too-real disaster when they locate a 'ghost ship' on a deadly collision course.

programme.title: Scorpion: Go With the Florence
programme.desc: While tracking a device that can prevent a nuclear meltdown through the Los Angeles sewers, Walter learns the nuances of listening and not offering advice to Paige.

programme.title: Scorpion: Faire is Foul
programme.desc: For Sylvester's birthday, Team Scorpion visits a renaissance festival, but the revelry is cut short when a group tries to rob a nearby police evidence locker.

programme.title: Scorpion: It's Raining Men (Of War)
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving, Team Scorpion's new neighbor, Florence \, joins them at sea on a mission to destroy a floating island of trash, but her flawed contribution leaves her, Walter and Happy stranded on the quickly dissolving island.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crime Every Mountain
programme.desc: As Cabe's trial looms over Team Scorpion, a simple case goes sideways when they help a father and his daughter whose plane crashes nearby.

programme.title: Scorpion: Who Let the Dog Out ('Cause Now It's Stuck in a Cistern)
programme.desc: As Team Scorpion anxiously awaits the verdict of Cabe's trial which could send him to prison, they focus their nervous energy on trying to save a dog stuck in a cistern.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: A war-hardened Crusader and his Moorish commander mount an audacious revolt against the corrupt English crown.

programme.title: Patriots Day
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Boston Marathon bombings, police Sgt. Tommy Saunders, FBI Special Agent Richard DesLauriers and Commissioner Ed Davis join survivors, first responders and other investigators in a race against time to find the suspects.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: A dramatization of the disaster in April 2010, when the offshore drilling rig called the Deepwater Horizon exploded, resulting in the worst oil spill in American history.

programme.title: Don't Bother to Knock
programme.desc: A flirtatious travel agent gives all his girlfriends keys to his flat, which seemingly backfires.

programme.title: Where There's a Will
programme.desc: Benjamin Stubbins, a penniless lawyer, has spent most of his money on liquor. When he interrupts a robbery at work, he is targeted by a gang of thieves who determine that, his relatives, are richer than he is.

programme.title: The Happiest Days of Your Life

programme.title: Home at Seven
programme.desc: David Preston, a bank official goes missing for 24 hours and has no memory of the lost time.

programme.title: Medium: Blood On The Tracks
programme.desc: When a man is killed by a train, Allison has a dream forewarning of an identical murder.

programme.title: Medium: Only Half Lucky

programme.title: Medium: Labor Pains
programme.desc: A desperate man pleads with Allison to help him find his missing wife.

programme.title: Medium: Me Without You
programme.desc: Allison and Joe begin new careers that take them in different directions.

programme.title: Medium: And Then
programme.desc: Now that Allison's special abilities have been revealed to the public, everyone's lives have been turned upside down.

programme.title: Medium: But For The Grace of God
programme.desc: Allison tries to help investigator Cynthia Keener find a missing teenage girl. Meanwhile, Ariel dreams of Allison's high school days from the '80s.

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When three men take the CEO of a mortgage company hostage, the SRU team is called to the scene to diffuse the situation.

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Sliders

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Quinn (Jerry O'Connell) is mistaken for a man with special powers when the Sliders (John Rhys-Davies, Sabrina Lloyd, Cleavant Derricks) land on an Earth populated with dragons and castles.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Quinn and Arturo (Jerry O'Connell, John Rhys-Davies) try to find a way of communicating with fire when the Sliders land on a world where the hot element has a mind of its own. With Sabrina Lloyd and Cleavant Derricks.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Remmy (Cleavant Derricks) finds himself with child when the Sliders land on a world where men carry babies for the last 20 weeks of gestation. With John Rhys-Davies.

programme.title: Sliders

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders (John Rhys-Davies, Jerry O'Connell, Sabrina Lloyd and Cleavant Derricks) encounter a world where a master manipulator seemingly has created robots to replace human beings.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Cheerleader On Trial
programme.desc: Ashamed of a pregnancy out of wedlock and fearful of her parents' reaction, high school senior Skylar Richardson told no one of her condition. But when a newborn’s body was found buried in the family’s backyard, Skylar was charged with murder.

programme.desc: The explorers discover an ancient Temple, where they face off against mystical and experience hallucinations. One of these visions gives them a map that leads Challenger to William Maple White.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Pirate's Curse
programme.desc: A seismic event opens the earth and send Marguerite and Roxton into a pit, where they discover a pirate's buried treasure...and his bones. A curse on the booty complicates matters.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Visitor
programme.desc: After Malone is attacked by a beast, he and Veronica meet her old friend Danu, who has also been injured. Danu goes missing, and the group travels to his village learning he is a werewolf.

programme.title: The Lost World: A Man of Vision
programme.desc: The five adventurers all experience visions of Summerlee, the companion they had presumed dead after he disappeared into a waterfall. They suffer injury and face danger as they pursue the vision.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E22 - Die Me, Dichotomy
programme.desc: Wealthy from their bank heist, Moya's crew heads straight to meet with Diagnosan Tocot, a famous surgeon whom they hope can heal Moya's burns.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E1 - Season Of Death
programme.desc: D'Argo and Stark try to heal John, left with his head open on an operating table, while Scorpius attempts to avoid discovery.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E2 - Suns And Lovers
programme.desc: Moya docks at a commerce station so the crew can spend some of their money. Disaster strikes when the station is hit by a storm.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E3 - Self Inflicted Wounds, Part 1: Could'a, Would'a, Should'a
programme.desc: Moya approaches a wormhole, gets pulled in and fused to another ship.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S3 E4 - Self Inflicted Wounds, Part 2: Wait For The Wheel
programme.desc: The crew works out a way of getting free from the other ship and out of the wormhole.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 214
programme.desc: Is a bathroom's hand dryer better than a paper towel? Which public restroom stall is the cleanest? Is it better to stand in the doorway during an earthquake?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 6
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a 1967 Chevy take off with JATO rockets, like in the tale of the JATO Rocket Car? Can Pop Rocks and soda, when eaten simultaneously, cause the eater's stomach to rupture?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 12
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a bullet cause explosive decompression and tear a plane apart? Will a bullet used as a fuse in a vehicle work, and then will it fire?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 172
programme.desc: How well do movie sound effects compare to their real-world counterparts? Can a sailboat stranded in calm water start moving by blowing air into its sail with an onboard fan?

programme.title: MythBusters: Upfront Demolition Derby Special
programme.desc: When a bus is moving at over 50 miles per hour, will moving passengers to the inside of the turn keep the bus from flipping? Will a car dropped from 4,000 feet fall faster than a speeding car?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While their sisters chose a life of sensible, suburban motherhood, these deadly women chose a life of crime. They lived with the thrills, the danger and the deadly consequences of being outlaws.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women never get their hands dirty: no blood touched them because they manipulate others to kill for them...but they didn't get away.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death in Alaska
programme.desc: The day began like any other for Cheryl and Paul Chapman, until the silence of a peaceful Sunday morning was shattered with a phone call.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Temple of Fear
programme.desc: In Miami, the discovery of a mutilated body sent investigators on the trail of a deadly cult. But agents found a wall of silence around the cult's members. Potential witnesses, terrified of reprisals, refused to talk.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Radical Agenda
programme.desc: In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Abroad
programme.desc: Beginning in 1990, Europe found itself in the clutches of a serial killer. He became an international outlaw, hopping from country to country to evade capture and to kill again.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Search For Lisa Rene
programme.desc: When a young woman was grabbed from her Texas home, the police raced to find her abductors. On the face of it, the kidnapping seemed like the random act of desperate men.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Starving Myself to Death
programme.desc: Pamela aims to weigh 40 pounds. Samantha, who suffers from bulimia and alcoholism, steals to accomplish her binging. Can both women confront their eating disorders with support and treatment?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
programme.desc: Kendra is on a mission to save herself from her toxic boyfriend Chris. At 17, Kendra is pregnant with his sixth child. Kendra has tried almost everything including kicking him out of their house, but he not only argued back but assaulted Kendra as well.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
programme.desc: Will Nadia and Woody's lie detector test results prove that they were negligent and deserved to lose custody of their children? Then, can Steve set the record straight about Josette's daughter?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Did It To Hurt You

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This
programme.desc: Is Khadisa's boyfriend Chad cheating on her with her own sister? Will Maya's ex trust her and her current beau with their infant son?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Who Did This?

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: 'Escape artist' Crocker, escapes from the police to ask Holmes to clear him from a murder charge.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Inspector Lestrade looks to Holmes for answers, after two men are murdered on separate occasions.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Margaret Martini's fiancee is missing, but the trail to his whereabouts leads to 7 other murders.

programme.title: Pursuit to Algiers
programme.desc: Holmes is recruited to escort the heir to a European throne safely back to his homeland after his father's assassination.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Toxic Death
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Mind Hunters

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Putting a twist on the original dishes eaten by a happy couple on their wedding day fifty years ago is the challenge for the remaining contestants.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Creating an innovative gourmet sandwich in just 30 minutes is the challenge for the contestants, with the winners being flown to a wine tasting.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The challenge set for the remaining contestants is a blind taste test, with the winning team heading off on a trip to Sea World.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Three Michelin-starred chefs judge a lobster dish cooked by the contestants as the challenge, with a prize of having caviar at a top restaurant at stake.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs are challenged to create a dish with as much consideraton for presentation as taste, with the winner receiving a makeover and photoshoot.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: No Mercy: The Killing of Virginia Morse
programme.desc: The horrific story of killers Allan Baker and Kevin Crump who began their murderous spree in rural NSW by killing a complete stranger for $20, a packet of cigarettes and a couple of litres of petrol.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Girls Who Knew Too Much

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.15
programme.desc: Ex live-in lovers fight over a truck repossession, a large co-signed loan, and insurance/After an arrest for stealing a lawnmower, a man is allegedly bailed out by his girlfriend who claims she helped pay for his gall bladder surgery.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.6

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Mortician, The Murder, The Movie

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Afraid of the Dark

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder at Sea?
programme.desc: The disappearance of newlywed George Smith, who vanished from a cruise in the Mediterranean. This report uncovers the questionable alibis, failed polygraphs and a provocative video that involves the three men who last saw Smith alive.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Full Moon
programme.desc: In August 1996, Yvette Rodier and Zach Snarr went to the mountains for their date to take photos of the full moon, when a stranger drove up, pulled out a gun and opened fire. Zach was killed. Yvette, shot four times, survived by pretending to be dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Preppy Killer

programme.title: 48 Hours: Why Did Josh Kill?
programme.desc: Eight-year-old Maddie Clifton of Jacksonville, Florida went outside to play and never came back. Seven days later a city-wide search led to the home of Josh Phillips, a 14-year-old neighbor, where Maddie's body was found under the boy's waterbed.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Always Money in Philadelphia
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, the guys face a shady bidder with inside information and former NFL star Vince Papale in a battle for a vintage football passing machine and a colonial musket that could be worth huge money if it's real.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: With Ton missing, Allen struggles to keep the pawn shop afloat while training Elle to work an auction. After a fierce bidding war with Caroline, pieces from a century old motorcycle may not be enough to save the day. ed.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Flying Ton, Creeping Allen

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Missouri Loves Company
programme.desc: On a visit to see Ton's sister in Missouri for some rafting and relaxation, the guys hit up a fast-paced live auction. After some tough losses, Ton and Allen score a ballista and an anvil set made for an explosive sport.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: With Friends Like This
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down outside his home . Sgt. Joe Kenda and Det. John Anderson must determine whether the killer was a complete stranger, a barrio gang member, or a jealous lover.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Settle the Score
programme.desc: When Johnny Crawford is killed in his easy chair, police are perplexed to learn he may have been shot over a musical instrument. It soon becomes clear the young man wasn’t killed for his own sins.

programme.title: See No Evil

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Sylvilla Humphrey shot her friend, Ercell Minix in the neck, at the beauty salon where she worked. The victim's son, 5 at the time, is now NBA star Kendrick Perkins.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Britney Gulley and Jeremisha Adams (both 19 at the time) are responsible for shootings and robberies that left two people dead and a third blind in both eyes.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: An investigation into whether Loyd and Agnes Courtney were beaten and stabbed to death by their daughter Deborah. Prosecutors say it was for money, but Deborah says she didn't do it.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre: Murder Files
programme.desc: Donal MacIntyre interviews Detective Chief Inspector Martin Brunning to discover how the capture of killer Joanna Dennehy led to the discovery of a string of victims.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre: Murder Files
programme.desc: Donal MacIntyre interviews former Detective Chief Inspector Clive Driscoll to discover how he investigated the suspected murder of Surjit Athwal, without a body or witness.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Bedroom Strangler

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Abducted Atheists

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Night Stalker

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Candy Man
programme.desc: On August 8, 1973, police in Pasadena, Texas received a phone call from a young man who had just committed murder.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When someone dies under mysterious circumstances, the spouse almost always is a suspect - especially if they are in bed, sleeping beside the individual at the time of their death.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a patient in a hospital emergency room said he cut his hand on a dumpster, the doctor recognised the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Cutting-edge DNA science finally reveals the identity of the 'Phoenix Canal Killer' who terrorised the Arizona city in the early 1990s and brutally took the lives of two women.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Two of America's premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When the body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill, investigators immediately view the hundreds of prisoners as suspects.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a nine year old girl headed for school vanishes from her quiet suburban neighborhood, an entire community starts searching for her abductor. Investigators wonder if her long-lost mother might be connected to the disappearance.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a state trooper is attacked, investigators uncover a `signature' that links the assault to the murder of a young woman.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets the owners of an abnormal humanoid skull allegedly discovered in Mexico in the 1930s and a researcher who has had the skull subjected to numerous tests including carbon-14 dating, and DNA in order to determine it’s origin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Mystery of Oak Island
programme.desc: Richard investigates Canada's best-known mysteries, the Oak Island treasure. Also known as the money pit, the site has become one of the world's deepest and most costly archaeological digs.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Energy Healing
programme.desc: Several energy healers claim they are able to produce spontaneous miraculous healing through a laying on of hands. Claims of similar such healing by a man in a remote village in Brazil, known as John of God are also examined.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Execution of MLK and The Framing of James Earl Ray
programme.desc: In this re-examination of the assassination of civil rights leader Martin Luther King, Richard meets several researchers who provide evidence that the convicted gunman, James Earl Ray was not the real triggerman.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Birthers - Obama's Birth Certificate
programme.desc: Richard interviews several prominent 'Birthers' who present evidence that proves Barack Obama is not eligible to be President because he does not meet the qualifications of a natural born citizen.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: RFID Chips
programme.desc: Could implantable RFID chips or Radio-frequency identification tags currently in widespread use in retail industry be used to surreptitiously track and control people?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Assassination of John Lennon
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show travels to New York, LA and Toronto in order to investigate the murder of John Lennon. Several researchers posit that Lennon's supposed killer Mark David Chapman was either a patsy or a mind-controlled assassin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Did Jim Morrison Fake His Death?
programme.desc: Is it conceivable that the Doors legendary front man did not die in a bathtub in Paris of an apparent drug overdose?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Water Engine
programme.desc: Did the late Stanley Meyer figure out a way to run an internal combustion engine on pure water? And was he murdered because of the threat his invention posed to Big Oil?

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem
programme.desc: From a scientist who recreates the crucifixion to an ancient amulet that proves Star Trek's Spock is Jewish, discover the secrets inside the Israel Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Uffizi Gallery, Florence
programme.desc: From a famous artist who vanished to a traitorous Nazi who saved the day, discover the secrets inside the Uffizi Gallery.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Historical Museum, Moscow
programme.desc: From the duel that killed a genius to Lenin’s Rolls-Royce, discover the secrets inside the State Historical Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC
programme.desc: From the Zeros that bombed Pearl Harbor to the rocket that could take humans to Mars, discover the secrets inside the Smithsonian Institution.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Chateau of Versailles, Paris
programme.desc: From the schemes of Marie Antoinette to the spectrum of a star that reveals the origin of human life, discover the secrets inside the Chateau of Versailles.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London
programme.desc: From the musket shot that killed Admiral Nelson to an anti-piracy commando raid, discover the secrets inside the National Maritime Museum.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Highway to Hail
programme.desc: George and his team head into "bears' cage", looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones in Texas and Oklahoma. Their storm chasing vehicles don't look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Arctic Winter
programme.desc: George links up with two experienced polar adventurers to explore frigid Canadian Arctic winter. The team uses skis to cross the fractured sea ice of Frobisher Bay, then dog teams to head North through the spectacular Auyuittuq Mountains.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Avalanches
programme.desc: Whenever there is unstable snow and gravity, gravity always wins. George travels to the Rocky Mountains to learn about how to stay alive in the back country.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Tornadoes
programme.desc: George embarks on his annual pilgrimage to the "Tornado Alley" area of the central U.S. to guide groups of people who want to witness the brute force of tornadoes in action

programme.title: Angry Planet: Indonesia
programme.desc: In Indonesia George visits massive Komodo Dragons, explores steaming sulfur vents of Papandayan, visits villagers whose town got swept away by Sidoarjo Mudflow, and tackles his toughest climb to date - the very active Semeru Volcano.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Iceland: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: George meets President of Iceland Ólafur Grímsson who spearheaded use of geothermal power; visits Blue Lagoon and geysers; explores volcanically active Haimaey Island and climbs an iceberg calving off the glaciers at Vatnajokull Lagoon.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Midwest Stormfest
programme.desc: This season the tornadoes begin early - in February. Through the season, George follows the big weather from Missouri west to the Dakotas, and dodges the huge, destructive Greensburg tornado in southern Kansas.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Boiling Lake
programme.desc: Tucked away, high in the mountains of the Caribbean island of Dominica lies a marvel of nature  a lake whose water literally boils and steams like a witch's cauldron.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Island Caving
programme.desc: Accompanied by a group of hardcore cavers from Alberta and British Columbia, George descends into spectacular caves that lead deep into the earth on Vancouver Island. The team carries inflatable kayaks to explore a dark underground river.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Fire And Water
programme.desc: It's the intense summer wildfires that often plague the area during their 24 hours of daylight. He travels by train, bike, plane and whitewater raft to reach the fires but Mother Nature has other plans for him and doesn't make things easy.

programme.title: The New Frontier: From There To Here
programme.desc: Series introduction and the study of Earth from orbit.

programme.title: STAR LIGHT, STAR BRIGHT
programme.desc: The two current science missions to our star; the sun have made great leaps forward in the science of how stars work, how they generate solar winds and how they affect their orbiting planets

programme.title: RISING TIDES
programme.desc: The next generation of Earth observation satellites are now in place maintaining the continuity of long-term climate data, in particular the planets rising temperatures and related ocean levels.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Cosmic and x rays, these mysterious and highly powerful particles from deep space are being investigated to finally discover where they come from.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Interface
programme.desc: The Ionisphere, where the Earth interfaces with space, is little understood, it effects radio communications, GPS signals and satellites alike.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Exo Planeta
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer closer at nearby stars with ever more fidelity they are discovering planets; exo planets, worlds outside our own solar system.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Edge of The Universe
programme.desc: The night sky is a time machine. The further we look out into the universe the further back in time we reach.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Mars: Adapt Or Leave
programme.desc: As the latest successes and failures come and go Mars continues to give up her secrets.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Heavy Lift

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel delivers the fabrication goods as he transplants an old 1948' cab onto a modern roll-off truck and creates one bad-ass trash truck.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Tender Trap

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Greed is Good
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Tears for Fears

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Picture This

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Till Duck Do Us Part
programme.desc: Everyone comes together to plan a surprise wedding for Phil and Kay, setting up a special ceremony on their land, which the whole family attends. Si distracts Phil and Kay by taking them on a "trip down memory lane".

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: So You Think You Can Date?
programme.desc: After discovering that Martin has to miss a Friday night poker game for a date, the guys (as well as their wives) take turns figuring out the best way to coach him for romance. When babysitting for Jep and Jessica turns into a rocky road.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hot Tub Grime Machine
programme.desc: The guys realize that Godwin has never really asked them for a favor, even though they are all always helping each other out. Godwin asks them to help him get a hot tub, so they set out to help him pick one up.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A-Jase-ent Living
programme.desc: Due to construction at Jase and Missy's house, Willie and Korie invite Jase and the kids to live with them while Missy is out of town visiting friends. Then, what begins in the duck call room as a series of "Gentlemen's Bets".

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Termite Be a Problem
programme.desc: Because of a termite problem at Duck Commander, the guys are forced to find a different location to work from - Godwin's House. But while at Godwin's house, Godwin gets a taxidermied gift from a past relative.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: John Luke After Dentist
programme.desc: John Luke and Sadie are getting some dental work done, complete with sedation, and it's up to Willie and Korie to take care of them through the process - including getting them back home safely.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Scoot Along Si
programme.desc: Si shows up to work on a mobility scooter, claiming to have an invisible injury from a fender bender with Willie. After losing her beloved turtle "Mr. T", Ms. Kay enlists Phil on a mission to find a new pet turtle.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Jerky Boys
programme.desc: A decision to try and make some duck jerky leads the boys to Godwin's garage and a minibike race. Phil and Kay have made Willie the executor of their will, and Phil wants to show Willie what he and his brothers will inherit when he and Kay pass away.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Going Si-ral
programme.desc: Si discovers Youtube, and, after watching a series of instructional videos, decides he can make something better. John Luke totals Willie's truck, and Willie realizes he may be raising the two worst drivers in all of Louisiana.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack-O-Lantern
programme.desc: The Robertsons host a Halloween event at Duck Commander, where they all come together to transform the warehouse into a "scarehouse." Everyone dresses up and Willie desperately tries to be the scariest, but none of the kids are afraid of him.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: O Little Town of West Monroe
programme.desc: The Robertsons perform a live nativity for their Church for Christmas, so the wives organize rehearsals to ensure that they pull off a great event. However, rehearsals get off to a bumpy start as the guys can't stop sharing their opinions.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Mother's Love
programme.desc: Four brothers go on the run to escape a court order that would split them up.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Country Doctor
programme.desc: A country doctor refuses to slow down and seems to be working himself to death.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Time in a Bottle
programme.desc: A district attorney clashes with a lawyer who agrees to defend a friend charged with stealing.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Back to Oakland
programme.desc: Mark returns to Oakland to become a police officer again, and is reunited with his old partner. However, he discovers his old beat has become a storm of racial hatred.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: We Have Forever - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan hopes that he'll be released from his duties to be reunited with his former wife when she passes away.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner
programme.desc: Medical Mysteries: Medics at a hospital fall gravely ill after treating a mysteriously ailing patient in a circumstance that can't be explained by science. Or can it?

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Weird Animal Behaviour
programme.desc: Weird Animal Behaviour: Three extraordinary stories about the supersensory power of animals, including a psychic octopus that correctly predicted multiple World Cup winners.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Mind Control
programme.desc: Mind Control: Three spine-tingling stories, including a seance that turns a housewife into a literary genius as she channels a spirit to write a series of acclaimed books.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: SETI
programme.desc: In October 2017, astronomers at the Pan-STARRS observatory saw something strange in our solar system: an object they named ‘Oumuamua’, the very first observed visitor from interstellar space. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Wales
programme.desc: Was a UFO shot down by the RAF above South Wales on the 26th of February 2016? Craig and Sarah Cruddas examine the evidence as they try to discover if it really was an extra-terrestrial event. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies: Chicago
programme.desc: Since reports of a disc crashing in Roswell in 1947, the archetypal UFO – the flying saucer – has captured public imagination. Craig and Sarah explore if flying saucers are evidence of extra-terrestrials. This programme contains some flashing images.

programme.title: Dynasty: Reconciliation
programme.desc: Blake and Daniel survive the plane crash. Jeff charters a helicopter and braves hazardous conditions to finally locate the wreckage. Krystle and Blake finally clear the air and renew their commitment to each other.

programme.title: Dynasty: Sammy Jo
programme.desc: Krystle accompanies Daniel to New York for his reunion with Sammy Jo, the child he's never known. While looking through photos Ashley snapped on assignment at a rock concert, Jeff is stunned to spot Fallon among the crowd.

programme.title: Dynasty: Kidnapped
programme.desc: As Alexis and Amanda emerge from an exclusive bridal salon, a car suddenly screeches to a halt and Amanda is pulled inside. A high-speed chase ensues. As Dex forces the kidnapper's car onto the sidewalk, Amanda breaks free.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Heiress
programme.desc: Dex tells a devastated Krystle that Daniel Reece is dead. Steven is outraged when Sammy Jo decides to fight for custody of her son in court. Jeff proposes marriage to Ashley. Sammy Jo learns that her monies will be held in trust with Krystle as executor.

programme.title: Dynasty: Royal Wedding
programme.desc: Elena confesses to Amanda that nothing happened in the bedroom with Prince Michael. Sammy Jo fits her roommate Rita with a blonde wig and has her practice duplicating Krystle's voice. Fallon has chosen a new name and heads for Denver.

programme.title: War Story: Where Hell is: The Leopold and the Scheldt
programme.desc: The Allies liberated Antwerp, the world’s largest deep-water port, on 4 September 1944, but it could only be accessed via the Scheldt Estuary, the perfect place for the Germans to make a stand.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: This first part of the series introduces the first tanks being deployed on the battlefields in northern France during WWI and describes the devastating effect these steel monsters had on an infantry confronted with them for the very first time.

programme.title: War Story
programme.desc: In April and May 1945, the long-suffering Dutch people, enduring the German-imposed Hongerwinter famine, enthusiastically welcomed their Canadian liberators, establishing the intense connection sustained for 70 years.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: The second episode starts on the morning of the 22nd of June 1941 when the Germans launched operation Barbarossa, the code name for the invasion of the Soviet Union.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: The third episode opens with Rommel’s second offensive in North Africa.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kim & Matt
programme.desc: Kim's been pouring her heart out to Matt for over 10 years. Now, Kim's facing a life-changing decision - should she marry her current boyfriend or find out if Matt is her soul mate?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jarrod & Abby
programme.desc: How do young people who've embraced the digital age find love? Often by connecting online with others they've never met in person before. The problem -- that cute guy you may be falling in love with could be lying about who he really is.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Max and co-host iO Tillett Wright help Mecca connect with a boy she's loved for years. But soon it's discovered that Mecca's digital beau may be using her pictures to catfish others! (S6, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Dylan receives an anonymous text warning him that his online love, Ally, is not who she says she is. After the mystery texter is revealed, Nev and Max uncover a huge web of deceit! (S6, ep10)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Cassie & Steve
programme.desc: Cassie was on a downward spiral until she got a friend request from a rapper named Steve. Two and a half years later, Cassie and Steve are engaged - but they have yet to meet.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Prophet & Trinity
programme.desc: While Prophet, of Grammy-nominated Nappy Roots, is making his rap career comeback, he connected online with Trinity. Prophet's ready to settle down, but is this beauty too good to be true? (S4, ep13)

programme.title: The Hills: Back To New York / One Last Chance
programme.desc: Whitney travels to New York expecting to reconnect with Alex, but a new boy named Jay steals her away. Heidi is miserable after being fired, and Spencer is making matters worse. (S4, ep14)

programme.title: The Hills: You Did This / It's About Trust
programme.desc: Lauren is enraged to learn that Audrina believed speculation that she and Justin were involved with each other. Heidi struggles balancing her relationships with Holly and Spencer. (S4, ep16)

programme.title: The Hills: Dream Boy, Dream Job / Mr. & Mrs. Pratt
programme.desc: Whitney gets offered a chance at her dream job in New York. Lauren grows nostalgic when she learns her parents are selling their house in Laguna Beach. (S4, ep18)

programme.title: The City: I'm Sorry Whit
programme.desc: When Jay finds out he's going on tour, Whitney isn't willing to give up on the relationship, but when Jay doesn't give her a choice their relationship ends in a tearful goodbye. (S1, ep12)

programme.title: The City: Finale
programme.desc: Fresh from a breakup with Jay, Whitney questions if she made the right decision leaving LA. An opportunity opens up at work, but Olivia is after the same position. (S1, ep13)

programme.title: The City: Sleeping With The Frenemy
programme.desc: Olivia's working at ELLE Magazine, but meets her match in co-worker Erin Kaplan. Whitney returns to work for Kelly Cutrone, & an old friend's in town, looking to crash with her. (S1, ep14)

programme.title: The City: Working Girls
programme.desc: Whitney wonders if working with a friend is a good idea when Roxy steps out of line on day one. Olivia wins Joe Zee's approval on a new project at ELLE, but Erin isn't impressed. (S1, ep15)

programme.title: The City: Its All Who You Know
programme.desc: Whitney goes behind Kelly's back to show her fashion designs to Bergdorf Goodman. Olivia shocks Erin by using her fashion world connections to succeed at her biggest ELLE task. (S1, ep16)

programme.title: The City: Meet the Fackelmayers
programme.desc: Whitney meets some cute brothers. Olivia thrives at an ELLE Magazine cocktail party & Erin reminds her that the fashion business isn't just about who you know but what you know. (S1, ep17)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bargain
programme.desc: The former dictator of a Caribbean island is made to have hallucinatory visions in which he sees his ominous destiny as part of an ingenious plot designed by the Impossible Missions Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Mind of Stefan Miklos
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is pitted against the ingenious logic of an enemy agent (guest Steve Ihnat) as the IMF attempts to lead the agent through a maze of complicated clues in order to reach a false conclusion.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Freeze
programme.desc: Before a statute of limitations expires on a 10-million dollar robbery, the Impossible Missions Force must spring the suspect from prison and dupe him into leading police to the hiding place of the money.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Test Case
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force must end the murderous career of a bacteriologist working for the enemy, who has succeeded in developing a mutant strain of a deadly bacteria which could be used as a practical battlefield weapon.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The System
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force led by Jim Phelps (Peter Graves) sets out to persuade the trusted henchman of a crime syndicate leader to testify against his boss.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: Chelsea's dad tries to cut Adam out of her life, Jenelle is arrested for breaking and entering, Kailyn signs a joint custody agreement and Leah and Corey tie the knot. Last in the series.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Finale Special: Check Up With Dr. Drew
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts the cast of Teen Mom 2 on-stage in front of a live studio audience. Jenelle, Chelsea, Kailyn and Leah reflect on the struggles of their first year of motherhood.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 1 Unseen Moment
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts a look at the humour and the heartbreaking moments never before seen with Kailyn, Leah, Jenelle and Chelsea from the first season of Teen Mom 2.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: Jenelle is back with Kieffer after bailing him out of jail, but everything hits the fan when Barbara finds out that she's been lying about Kieffer and kicks her out.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Germany launched Operation Barbarossa, a savage and merciless attack on the Soviet Union. Now, newly colorised film and amateur home movies provide an unprecedented inside look at this brutal conflict.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: 1942. Nazi Germany's Blitzkrieg enters Egypt. Field Marshal Erwin Rommel, aka the Desert Fox, has his eyes set on Cairo, but first he must overcome General Bernard Montgomery, the British Eighth Army, and the area's punishing fighting conditions.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: July 1943. For six months, the German advance has stalled, but Hitler is convinced that his new generation of Nazi tanks will help put the Reich back on the path to European domination. His target: the Soviet town of Kursk.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: Stunning, newly colorised combat and newsreel footage plus personal memoirs take us to the heart of a battle that would be a catastrophic blow to both sides and leave a muddy graveyard across East Belgium.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: Rare newsreel and amateur footage, newly colorised, take us inside Hitler's crumbling empire and onto the front lines of the firefight for the streets of Berlin, a battle that will determine the fate of World War II.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Maine Event, The
programme.desc: It's week seven of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, Gloucester captains must decide whether go where the fish are biting or take their chances fishing inshore.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Battle At Midway
programme.desc: It's week eight of the Atlantic bluefin tuna season, the midway point of fishing where crews either knuckle down and push hard, or crumble from the grind.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Wicked Pissed
programme.desc: It's week nine of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and Captain Paul Hebert, struggles to prove his worth as a captain after catching only three tuna in the first two months of fishing.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: When Push Comes to Shove
programme.desc: It's week ten of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season in Gloucester, Massachusetts, and, with only six weeks of fishing left, the competition is heating up.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Three’s a Charm
programme.desc: It's week 11 of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna season, and bad luck, bait problems and big egos plague the Gloucester fleet.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Caviar
programme.desc: Region 7 wardens converge upon the Intake fishing access site on the Yellowstone River as the annual paddlefish migration is in full swing. Watch anglers snag paddlefish and Wardens snag illegal anglers!

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Camper
programme.desc: The Tongue River Reservoir State Park in south-central Montana is a popular summer destination for recreationists and fishermen, and Warden Mike Krings has his hands full keeping peace among the night crowd.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Yellowstone
programme.desc: Wardens in Region 5 work their way up the Yellowstone River with a jet boat checking fly fishing outfitters while coming across a boat accident along the way. Then it's over to Region 1 for firearms training.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Antelope Dummy
programme.desc: With Pronghorn antelope populations dwindling, Wardens of Region 7 run a decoy sting the day before the season begins but the real problem arises with trespassing on the opener. Then Region 4 Warden Bryan Golie has a potential poaching call.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Cascade
programme.desc: The Upper Missouri River is a blue-ribbon trout fishery & popular rafting destination. The Cascade district in Region 4 has its share of excitement with the mysterious camper parked on private land. Then over to Region 7 for some water safety checks.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Blackfoot
programme.desc: Region 2 wardens are responding to a Tip Mont call with multiple elk down in grizzly country. Upon arrival, one elk & the suspect are missing. In the meantime, wardens in Region 7 have shots fired during a decoy sting.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Spotted Dog
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Mac Pass
programme.desc: This week our Wardens receive a Tip-Mont call about a few illegally taken elk and pursue the the suspects.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Paddlefish
programme.desc: This week our Wardens are in Montana monitoring the rivers while people paddlefish and we also try and eliminate a pesky bear from one man's property.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Interstate Game Check
programme.desc: This week the Wardens set up a game checkpoint to make sure everyone is following the rules.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Chuck Coal
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Close Encounters: Proof of Alien Contact
programme.desc: This documentary examines whether UFOs are real. It studies over 250 amateur video clips, evaluates several recent revelations about Roswell, and examines footage of the removal of an alien implant.

programme.title: The Witnesses :Ancient Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Contactee, sighter, and abductee share similar and different experiences with beings from other dimensions, leaving a lasting mark of their presence.

programme.title: Aliens and Pyramids
programme.desc: Many pyramidal structures around the world exhibit strange glyphs of futuristic objects and signs of advanced machining with laser perfection. Was there help from an extraterrestrial source?

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Belgian UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Belgian UFO, (Pts. 1 & 2), UD: I.D. Swap, Brenda's Fire and Philip Breen & UD.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 1
programme.desc: Tattoo Fixers on Holidays is back and this week new arrival Glen banishes bad boy Ashley's Magaluf moto, Sketch helps Bobby get rid of his rank rabbit, Alice gives Rachel a sentimental design, and Jay strips Clair of an awful ex tat.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 2
programme.desc: The Tattoo Fixers on Holiday are back in the sunny Med, and this week Glen licks Gabriela's tat into shape, Sketch covers Eileen's saucy self-portrait and Alice gives Aimee a confidence boosting original.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 4
programme.desc: Jay, Sketch and Alice are tasked with covering Holly's filthy foot, Vicky's triple nipple, and Josh's romance-ruining wrist, as well as tackling Adam's bawdy butterfly, Dan's drunken decision, and Shannon's blush-worthy birthmark.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 7
programme.desc: Jay, Sketch and Alice face Scott's manscaping stickmen, Chelsea's superfan signature, and Jack's silly souvenir. Meanwhile, fun-loving divorcee Kat, partygoing parents Kay and Richard, and diabetic Sean all go under the needle.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 5
programme.desc: The pop up parlour in the sun gets a visit from a noughties heartthrob. Glen transforms Dave's shoddy shot glass. Sketch gives Zoe a bespoke design, Alice helps Jodie get rid of a bad decision and Glen rids Max of his unusual love.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 9
programme.desc: Ladies' man Ash needs help covering an embarrassing portrait of his beloved mum. Sean wants a cover for his leg tattoo of two dogs doing what comes naturally. Dancer Jay-Jay loses her X-rated tatt.

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie could give birth at any moment. Sophie opens up to Holly about her heartbreak. Chester gives Gary the run around and Aaron faces up to the reality of becoming a Dad. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Gary plans a life-changing surprise for Emma. Holly goes to see some unicorns. Sophie struggles to forget her ex and Marnie has a traumatic labour. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Sophie gets ready to celebrate her 30th birthday in style. Marnie adjusts to her new life. Holly takes Jacob shopping and Gary prepares to go down on one knee. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie's illness catches up with her. Gary takes Aaron "Dad training" and Sophie receives some devastating news. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron gets called out at an MMA fight. Marnie is finally ready to have visitors and Holly and Jacob throw an epic engagement party. (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron takes up golf with hilarious results. Sophie makes a life changing purchase. Holly has a fitness photo shoot and Marnie & Casey have their first date since Rox's birth. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: The Love Boat: Hello Emily, The Tour Guide, The Winning Number
programme.desc: A wealthy widow is insulted when Captain Stubing rebuffs her advances, a young tour guide loses her group but finds love, and a man who recently won $8 million is actually a very obnoxious person.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Second Time Around, Hello, Spencer, Runaway, Go Home

programme.desc: Gopher breaks a priceless statue while trying to impress a woman. Judy is blamed for wrecking a marriage, and Ace gets into trouble with two couples.

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen Gets Her Goose Cooked/Best of The Nest
programme.desc: Sue Ellen is the champion of the popular Internet game, Virtualgoose.com, but she’s become obsessed! And now the gang has moved onto Best of the Nest. Will any of his friends be willing to forgo their computers for a real, live adventure?

programme.title: Arthur: Cast Away/The Great Sock Mystery
programme.desc: Arthur is thrilled when Dad invites him to go fly-fishing for the weekend. But a change in plans forces them to include D.W. Find out once and for all where socks disappear to when Baby Kate and Pal team up to solve the great sock mystery.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Loses His Marbles/Friday The 13th
programme.desc: When Arthur discovers that Grandma Thora is a marbles champion, he trains with her so he can beat all his friends. Then, Brain doesn't believe in superstitions, so when he has a string of bad luck, he's stunned.

programme.title: Arthur: Lights, Camera...Opera!/All Worked Up
programme.desc: When Muffy's Dad gives her concert tickets, she couldn't be more excited--until she discovers that she's going to the opera. And Arthur aced five quizzes in a row! But his luck runs out when Mom takes a new job.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Barnes, Wingman/To Beat Or Not To Beat
programme.desc: Does Binky have a favorite pastime? Not until citywide Bug Week, when suddenly all he can think about is butterflies. Then, there's a horrible racket in Elwood City, and it's Francine practicing her singing and drumming for the Talent Show!

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Second Chance/Arthur and the Whole Truth
programme.desc: With the help of a little time travel, Buster turns back the clock to see what his life would be like if he were a genius. Arthur isn't happy when he discovers that Buster has been telling him some white lies, just to spare his feelings.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Aims High/Flaw and Order
programme.desc: D.W. wants to be the first person to set foot on Mars! But what if scary purple aliens eat her? Who's responsible for cracking Dad's cake platter? DUN-DUN! All the evidence points to Arthur!

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Unravels/All the Rage
programme.desc: Grandma Thora teaches Arthur to knit and he's really into this new hobby. But…he's a kid! And a boy! Knitting is a grandma thing, right? And, Muffy wants to rock the fashion world, but creating a fad is a lot harder than it looks.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's New Puppy/Arthur Bounces Back
programme.desc: Arthur's new puppy is exactly what he wanted. He's cute and wriggly, and he follows Arthur everywhere. But training a puppy is harder than Arthur thought. Then, a mere $10 stands between Arthur and the shoes he's been dreaming about.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Blame Game - Airplanes
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an art show project that Melanie has made. Afraid that she will be angry, he doesn't say anything, but then feels guilty. Barney helps him see that honesty and taking responsibility for what we do is always best. together.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: BJ's Really Cool House
programme.desc: Although the park may be a home away from home for Barney and his friends, BJ wants to build his own "totally awesome, completely cool" house. While BJ works on his house, Barney and the children learn all about houses and homes.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: All Aboard
programme.desc: Kami, one of Barney's youngest friends, has trouble keeping up with the other kids and she's tired of always being last. She's not having a very good day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Moving Along
programme.desc: Barney plays a fun game of "Simon Says" with Baby Bop and BJ in the park. They demonstrate how to move their bodies through dancing and playing games.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Imagine That!
programme.desc: While Baby Bop and BJ are pretending to be pirates, Barney creates a magical island for their fantastic adventure. Together they discover ways to have fun while playing dress up, pretending, and being silly.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sweeter Than Candy
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ are helping the park kids get ready for a school play. When Barney tells everyone that putting on shows began in Greece, they want to go visit! While there, they meet some friends and decide to put on a play in an amphitheatre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids take imaginary trips to different countries with the magical caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Butterflies - Nature Of Things
programme.desc: Baby Bop is sad because she lost her pet caterpillar, Monty. Barney and the others try to help her find it. Baby Bop is surprised to discover Monty inside a chrysalis. Everyone is excited to find Monty—now a beautiful butterfly!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Magic Caboose - Arts
programme.desc: Melanie is sad because she misses her friend who is visiting relatives in India. Barney shows his friends that it's fun to go to new places and see new things by taking them on an imaginary journey on the Magic Caboose!
